using Newtonsoft.Json;
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace StationpediaEditor.Models
{
    public class DeviceDescription
    {
        [JsonProperty("deviceKey")]
        public string DeviceKey { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [JsonProperty("deviceTitle")]
        public string? DeviceTitle { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("displayName")]
        public string? DisplayName { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("title")]
        public string? Title { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("logicDescriptions")]
        public Dictionary<string, LogicDescription>? LogicDescriptions { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("slots")]
        public List<SlotDescription>? Slots { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("OperationalDetails")]
        public List<OperationalDetail>? OperationalDetails { get; set; }

        // Display name property for UI binding
        [JsonIgnore]
        public string DisplayText => DisplayName ?? Title ?? DeviceTitle ?? DeviceKey;

        // Category derived from device key prefix
        [JsonIgnore]
        public string Category
        {
            get
            {
                if (DeviceKey.StartsWith("ThingStructure"))
                    return "Structures";
                if (DeviceKey.StartsWith("ThingItem"))
                    return "Items";
                if (DeviceKey.StartsWith("ThingTool"))
                    return "Tools";
                if (DeviceKey.StartsWith("ThingRobot"))
                    return "Robots";
                if (DeviceKey.StartsWith("Thing"))
                    return "Other Things";
                return "Other";
            }
        }

        // Subcategory based on device type
        [JsonIgnore]
        public string SubCategory
        {
            get
            {
                var key = DeviceKey.ToLower();
                
                // Robotic Arm variants
                if (key.Contains("larre") || key.Contains("roboticarm"))
                    return "Robotic Arms";
                
                // Power devices
                if (key.Contains("battery") || key.Contains("generator") || key.Contains("solar") || 
                    key.Contains("transformer") || key.Contains("apc"))
                    return "Power";
                
                // Atmospheric devices
                if (key.Contains("air") || key.Contains("gas") || key.Contains("atmos") || 
                    key.Contains("vent") || key.Contains("filtration") || key.Contains("conditioning"))
                    return "Atmospheric";
                
                // Manufacturing
                if (key.Contains("furnace") || key.Contains("manufacturer") || key.Contains("fabricator") || 
                    key.Contains("autolathe") || key.Contains("recycler"))
                    return "Manufacturing";
                
                // Storage
                if (key.Contains("locker") || key.Contains("crate") || key.Contains("tank") || 
                    key.Contains("canister"))
                    return "Storage";
                
                // Logic & Computing
                if (key.Contains("logic") || key.Contains("computer") || key.Contains("circuit") || 
                    key.Contains("sensor"))
                    return "Logic & Computing";
                
                // Lights
                if (key.Contains("light") || key.Contains("lamp"))
                    return "Lighting";
                
                // Doors & Access
                if (key.Contains("door") || key.Contains("airlock"))
                    return "Doors & Access";
                
                // Agriculture
                if (key.Contains("hydro") || key.Contains("plant") || key.Contains("farm"))
                    return "Agriculture";
                
                return "Miscellaneous";
            }
        }
    }

    public class LogicDescription
    {
        [JsonProperty("dataType")]
        public string? DataType { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("range")]
        public string? Range { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("description")]
        public string? Description { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("access")]
        public string? Access { get; set; }
    }

    public class SlotDescription
    {
        [JsonProperty("name")]
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [JsonProperty("type")]
        public string? Type { get; set; }
    }

    public class OperationalDetail
    {
        [JsonProperty("title")]
        public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [JsonProperty("description")]
        public string Description { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }
}

```

```
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using Newtonsoft.Json.Linq;
using StationpediaEditor.Models;
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;

namespace StationpediaEditor.Services
{
    public class JsonService
    {
        public List<DeviceDescription> LoadDescriptions(string filePath)
        {
            try
            {
                var jsonText = File.ReadAllText(filePath);
                
                // Parse as array directly (the file is a JSON array, not an object with "devices" property)
                var devices = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<List<DeviceDescription>>(jsonText);
                
                return devices ?? new List<DeviceDescription>();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                throw new Exception($"Failed to load descriptions.json: {ex.Message}", ex);
            }
        }

        public void SaveDescriptions(string filePath, List<DeviceDescription> devices)
        {
            try
            {
                // Create backup
                if (File.Exists(filePath))
                {
                    var backupPath = $"{filePath}.backup_{DateTime.Now:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}";
                    File.Copy(filePath, backupPath, true);
                }

                // Serialize with indentation
                var settings = new JsonSerializerSettings
                {
                    Formatting = Formatting.Indented,
                    NullValueHandling = NullValueHandling.Ignore,
                    DefaultValueHandling = DefaultValueHandling.Ignore
                };

                var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(devices, settings);
                File.WriteAllText(filePath, json);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                throw new Exception($"Failed to save descriptions.json: {ex.Message}", ex);
            }
        }

        public Dictionary<string, List<DeviceDescription>> GroupByCategory(List<DeviceDescription> devices)
        {
            return devices
                .GroupBy(d => d.Category)
                .ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.ToList());
        }

        public Dictionary<string, List<DeviceDescription>> GroupBySubCategory(List<DeviceDescription> devices)
        {
            return devices
                .GroupBy(d => d.SubCategory)
                .ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.ToList());
        }
    }
}

```

<Application x:Class="StationpediaEditor.App"
             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:ui="http://schemas.modernwpf.com/2019"
             StartupUri="Views/MainWindow.xaml">
    <Application.Resources>
        <ResourceDictionary>
            <ResourceDictionary.MergedDictionaries>
                <ui:ThemeResources />
                <ui:XamlControlsResources />
                
                <!-- Stationeers Color Scheme -->
                <ResourceDictionary>
                    <!-- Primary Colors -->
                    <Color x:Key="StationeersOrange">#FF8932</Color>
                    <Color x:Key="StationeersBlue">#2A5D8F</Color>
                    <Color x:Key="StationeersLightBlue">#3B7FBF</Color>
                    <Color x:Key="StationeersWhite">#F5F5F5</Color>
                    <Color x:Key="StationeersDarkGray">#1A1A1A</Color>
                    <Color x:Key="StationeersGray">#2D2D2D</Color>
                    
                    <!-- Brushes -->
                    <SolidColorBrush x:Key="StationeersOrangeBrush" Color="{StaticResource StationeersOrange}"/>
                    <SolidColorBrush x:Key="StationeersBlueBrush" Color="{StaticResource StationeersBlue}"/>
                    <SolidColorBrush x:Key="StationeersLightBlueBrush" Color="{StaticResource StationeersLightBlue}"/>
                    <SolidColorBrush x:Key="StationeersWhiteBrush" Color="{StaticResource StationeersWhite}"/>
                    <SolidColorBrush x:Key="StationeersDarkGrayBrush" Color="{StaticResource StationeersDarkGray}"/>
                    <SolidColorBrush x:Key="StationeersGrayBrush" Color="{StaticResource StationeersGray}"/>
                    
                    <!-- Override ModernWPF theme colors -->
                    <SolidColorBrush x:Key="SystemAccentColor" Color="{StaticResource StationeersOrange}"/>
                    <SolidColorBrush x:Key="SystemAccentColorLight1" Color="{StaticResource StationeersLightBlue}"/>
                    <SolidColorBrush x:Key="SystemAccentColorLight2" Color="{StaticResource StationeersBlue}"/>
                    
                    <!-- Custom Styles -->
                    <Style x:Key="CategoryHeaderTextStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
                        <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="16"/>
                        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource StationeersOrangeBrush}"/>
                        <Setter Property="Margin" Value="8,4"/>
                    </Style>
                    
                    <Style x:Key="DeviceNameTextStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
                        <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="14"/>
                        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Medium"/>
                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource StationeersWhiteBrush}"/>
                    </Style>
                    
                    <Style x:Key="PropertyLabelStyle" TargetType="TextBlock">
                        <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
                        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource StationeersLightBlueBrush}"/>
                        <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0,8,0,4"/>
                    </Style>
                    
                    <Style x:Key="StationeersButtonStyle" TargetType="Button" BasedOn="{StaticResource {x:Type Button}}">
                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="{StaticResource StationeersOrangeBrush}"/>
                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{StaticResource StationeersWhiteBrush}"/>
                        <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0"/>
                        <Setter Property="Padding" Value="16,8"/>
                        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
                        <Setter Property="Cursor" Value="Hand"/>
                    </Style>
                </ResourceDictionary>
            </ResourceDictionary.MergedDictionaries>
        </ResourceDictionary>
    </Application.Resources>
</Application>

using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel;
using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.Input;
using StationpediaEditor.Models;
using StationpediaEditor.Services;
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Collections.ObjectModel;
using System.Linq;
using System.Windows;
using Microsoft.Win32;

namespace StationpediaEditor.ViewModels
{
    public partial class MainViewModel : ObservableObject
    {
        private readonly JsonService _jsonService;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private string _filePath = string.Empty;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private ObservableCollection<CategoryNode> _categories = new();

        [ObservableProperty]
        private ObservableCollection<DeviceDescription> _devices = new();

        [ObservableProperty]
        private DeviceDescription? _selectedDevice;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private string _searchText = string.Empty;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private bool _isFileLoaded;

        [ObservableProperty]
        private string _statusMessage = "Ready. Click 'Open File' to load descriptions.json";

        private List<DeviceDescription> _allDevices = new();

        public MainViewModel()
        {
            _jsonService = new JsonService();
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private void OpenFile()
        {
            var dialog = new OpenFileDialog
            {
                Filter = "JSON Files (*.json)|*.json|All Files (*.*)|*.*",
                Title = "Open descriptions.json",
                FileName = "descriptions.json"
            };

            if (dialog.ShowDialog() == true)
            {
                LoadFile(dialog.FileName);
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private void SaveFile()
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(FilePath) || !IsFileLoaded)
            {
                StatusMessage = "No file loaded to save.";
                return;
            }

            try
            {
                _jsonService.SaveDescriptions(FilePath, _allDevices);
                StatusMessage = $"✓ Saved successfully at {DateTime.Now:HH:mm:ss}";
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show($"Error saving file: {ex.Message}", "Save Error", 
                    MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);
                StatusMessage = $"✗ Save failed: {ex.Message}";
            }
        }

        partial void OnSearchTextChanged(string value)
        {
            FilterDevices();
        }

        private void LoadFile(string filePath)
        {
            try
            {
                StatusMessage = "Loading...";
                _allDevices = _jsonService.LoadDescriptions(filePath);
                FilePath = filePath;
                IsFileLoaded = true;

                BuildCategoryTree();
                FilterDevices();

                StatusMessage = $"✓ Loaded {_allDevices.Count} devices";
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show($"Error loading file: {ex.Message}", "Load Error", 
                    MessageBoxButton.OK, MessageBoxImage.Error);
                StatusMessage = $"✗ Load failed: {ex.Message}";
            }
        }

        private void BuildCategoryTree()
        {
            var grouped = _allDevices
                .GroupBy(d => d.Category)
                .OrderBy(g => g.Key);

            var newCategories = new ObservableCollection<CategoryNode>();

            foreach (var categoryGroup in grouped)
            {
                var categoryNode = new CategoryNode
                {
                    Name = categoryGroup.Key,
                    DeviceCount = categoryGroup.Count()
                };

                var subGroups = categoryGroup
                    .GroupBy(d => d.SubCategory)
                    .OrderBy(g => g.Key);

                foreach (var subGroup in subGroups)
                {
                    categoryNode.SubCategories.Add(new CategoryNode
                    {
                        Name = subGroup.Key,
                        DeviceCount = subGroup.Count(),
                        ParentCategory = categoryGroup.Key
                    });
                }

                newCategories.Add(categoryNode);
            }

            Categories = newCategories;
        }

        private void FilterDevices()
        {
            if (!IsFileLoaded) return;

            IEnumerable<DeviceDescription> filtered = _allDevices;

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SearchText))
            {
                var search = SearchText.ToLower();
                filtered = filtered.Where(d =>
                    d.DeviceKey.ToLower().Contains(search) ||
                    d.DisplayText.ToLower().Contains(search));
            }

            Devices = new ObservableCollection<DeviceDescription>(filtered);
        }

        public void FilterByCategory(string category, string? subCategory = null)
        {
            IEnumerable<DeviceDescription> filtered = _allDevices;

            filtered = filtered.Where(d => d.Category == category);

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(subCategory))
            {
                filtered = filtered.Where(d => d.SubCategory == subCategory);
            }

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SearchText))
            {
                var search = SearchText.ToLower();
                filtered = filtered.Where(d =>
                    d.DeviceKey.ToLower().Contains(search) ||
                    d.DisplayText.ToLower().Contains(search));
            }

            Devices = new ObservableCollection<DeviceDescription>(filtered);
        }
    }

    public class CategoryNode : ObservableObject
    {
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int DeviceCount { get; set; }
        public string? ParentCategory { get; set; }
        public ObservableCollection<CategoryNode> SubCategories { get; set; } = new();
    }
}

```

<Window x:Class="StationpediaEditor.Views.MainWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:ui="http://schemas.modernwpf.com/2019"
        xmlns:vm="clr-namespace:StationpediaEditor.ViewModels"
        Title="Stationpedia Editor" 
        Height="900" Width="1600"
        MinHeight="600" MinWidth="1000"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
        Background="{DynamicResource SystemChromeMediumColor}"
        ui:WindowHelper.UseModernWindowStyle="True">
    
    <Window.DataContext>
        <vm:MainViewModel />
    </Window.DataContext>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <!-- Toolbar -->
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <!-- Search -->
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>    <!-- Main Content -->
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <!-- Status Bar -->
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- Toolbar -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="{StaticResource StationeersDarkGrayBrush}" 
                BorderBrush="{StaticResource StationeersOrangeBrush}" BorderThickness="0,0,0,2">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="12,8">
                <Button Content="📁 Open File" 
                        Command="{Binding OpenFileCommand}"
                        Style="{StaticResource StationeersButtonStyle}"
                        Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                <Button Content="💾 Save" 
                        Command="{Binding SaveFileCommand}"
                        Style="{StaticResource StationeersButtonStyle}"
                        IsEnabled="{Binding IsFileLoaded}"
                        Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                <Separator Style="{StaticResource {x:Static ToolBar.SeparatorStyleKey}}" 
                          Margin="8,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding FilePath}" 
                          VerticalAlignment="Center"
                          Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersWhiteBrush}"
                          Margin="8,0"
                          FontSize="11"
                          Opacity="0.7"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- Search Bar -->
        <Border Grid.Row="1" Background="{StaticResource StationeersGrayBrush}" Padding="12,8">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                    <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                
                <TextBox ui:ControlHelper.PlaceholderText="🔍 Search devices..." 
                         Text="{Binding SearchText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         FontSize="14"
                         Padding="8,6"
                         IsEnabled="{Binding IsFileLoaded}"/>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- Main Content Area -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="2" Margin="0">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="280" MinWidth="200"/> <!-- Categories -->
                <ColumnDefinition Width="4"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="400" MinWidth="300"/> <!-- Device List -->
                <ColumnDefinition Width="4"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*" MinWidth="400"/>   <!-- Editor -->
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- Categories Panel -->
            <Border Grid.Column="0" 
                    Background="{StaticResource StationeersDarkGrayBrush}"
                    BorderBrush="{StaticResource StationeersGrayBrush}"
                    BorderThickness="0,0,1,0">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                    <TextBlock Text="📂 CATEGORIES" 
                              Style="{StaticResource CategoryHeaderTextStyle}"
                              Background="{StaticResource StationeersGrayBrush}"
                              Padding="8"/>

                    <TreeView Grid.Row="1" 
                             ItemsSource="{Binding Categories}"
                             BorderThickness="0"
                             Background="Transparent"
                             Padding="4"
                             ScrollViewer.HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled">
                        <TreeView.ItemTemplate>
                            <HierarchicalDataTemplate ItemsSource="{Binding SubCategories}">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,2">
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}" 
                                              Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersWhiteBrush}"
                                              FontSize="13"
                                              FontWeight="Medium"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding DeviceCount, StringFormat=' ({0})'}" 
                                              Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersOrangeBrush}"
                                              FontSize="11"
                                              Opacity="0.8"
                                              Margin="4,0,0,0"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </HierarchicalDataTemplate>
                        </TreeView.ItemTemplate>
                    </TreeView>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" 
                         Width="4" 
                         HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                         Background="{StaticResource StationeersGrayBrush}"/>

            <!-- Device List Panel -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" 
                    Background="{StaticResource StationeersDarkGrayBrush}">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                    <Border Background="{StaticResource StationeersGrayBrush}" Padding="8">
                        <StackPanel>
                            <TextBlock Style="{StaticResource CategoryHeaderTextStyle}" Margin="0">
                                <Run Text="📋 DEVICES"/>
                                <Run Text="{Binding Devices.Count, StringFormat=' ({0})'}" 
                                     Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersOrangeBrush}"/>
                            </TextBlock>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Border>

                    <ListBox Grid.Row="1" 
                            ItemsSource="{Binding Devices}"
                            SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedDevice}"
                            BorderThickness="0"
                            Background="Transparent"
                            ScrollViewer.HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled">
                        <ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Padding="12,8" 
                                       Background="Transparent"
                                       BorderBrush="{StaticResource StationeersGrayBrush}"
                                       BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding DisplayText}" 
                                                  Style="{StaticResource DeviceNameTextStyle}"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding DeviceKey}" 
                                                  FontSize="11"
                                                  Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersBlueBrush}"
                                                  Opacity="0.7"
                                                  Margin="0,2,0,0"/>
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,4,0,0">
                                            <Border Background="{StaticResource StationeersOrangeBrush}"
                                                   Padding="6,2" CornerRadius="2" Margin="0,0,4,0"
                                                   Opacity="0.8">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding SubCategory}" 
                                                          FontSize="9"
                                                          Foreground="White"
                                                          FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                            </Border>
                                            <Border Background="{StaticResource StationeersBlueBrush}"
                                                   Padding="6,2" CornerRadius="2"
                                                   Opacity="0.6"
                                                   Visibility="{Binding OperationalDetails, 
                                                       Converter={StaticResource NullToVisibilityConverter}}">
                                                <TextBlock Text="Has Op.Details" 
                                                          FontSize="9"
                                                          Foreground="White"
                                                          FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                            </Border>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                    </ListBox>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="3" 
                         Width="4" 
                         HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                         Background="{StaticResource StationeersGrayBrush}"/>

            <!-- Editor Panel -->
            <Border Grid.Column="4" 
                    Background="{StaticResource StationeersDarkGrayBrush}">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Padding="16">
                    <ContentControl Content="{Binding SelectedDevice}">
                        <ContentControl.ContentTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <!-- This will be filled in Phase 4 -->
                                <TextBlock Text="Select a device to edit" 
                                          Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersWhiteBrush}"
                                          FontSize="14"
                                          HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                                          VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                          Opacity="0.5"/>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ContentControl.ContentTemplate>
                    </ContentControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </Border>
        </Grid>

        <!-- Status Bar -->
        <Border Grid.Row="3" 
                Background="{StaticResource StationeersDarkGrayBrush}"
                BorderBrush="{StaticResource StationeersOrangeBrush}"
                BorderThickness="0,2,0,0"
                Padding="12,6">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding StatusMessage}" 
                      Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersWhiteBrush}"
                      FontSize="11"/>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

```

using System;
using System.Globalization;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Data;

namespace StationpediaEditor.Converters
{
    public class NullToVisibilityConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            return value != null ? Visibility.Visible : Visibility.Collapsed;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }
}

```

<UserControl x:Class="StationpediaEditor.Views.DeviceEditorView"
             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:ui="http://schemas.modernwpf.com/2019">
    
    <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
        <StackPanel Margin="16">
            <!-- Header -->
            <TextBlock Text="✏️ DEVICE EDITOR" 
                      Style="{StaticResource CategoryHeaderTextStyle}"
                      FontSize="18"
                      Margin="0,0,0,16"/>

            <!-- Basic Info Section -->
            <Border Background="{StaticResource StationeersGrayBrush}" 
                   Padding="16" CornerRadius="4" Margin="0,0,0,16">
                <StackPanel>
                    <TextBlock Text="📝 Basic Information" 
                              Style="{StaticResource CategoryHeaderTextStyle}"
                              Margin="0,0,0,12"/>

                    <TextBlock Text="Device Key (Read-Only)" 
                              Style="{StaticResource PropertyLabelStyle}"/>
                    <TextBox Text="{Binding DeviceKey}" 
                            IsReadOnly="True"
                            Background="{StaticResource StationeersDarkGrayBrush}"
                            Opacity="0.7"
                            Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                    <TextBlock Text="Display Name" 
                              Style="{StaticResource PropertyLabelStyle}"/>
                    <TextBox Text="{Binding DisplayName, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" 
                            ui:ControlHelper.PlaceholderText="Optional display name..."
                            Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                    <TextBlock Text="Device Title" 
                              Style="{StaticResource PropertyLabelStyle}"/>
                    <TextBox Text="{Binding DeviceTitle, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" 
                            ui:ControlHelper.PlaceholderText="Optional device title..."
                            Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                    <TextBlock Text="Title" 
                              Style="{StaticResource PropertyLabelStyle}"/>
                    <TextBox Text="{Binding Title, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" 
                            ui:ControlHelper.PlaceholderText="Optional title..."
                            Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                    <TextBlock Text="📊 Category Information" 
                              Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersLightBlueBrush}"
                              FontSize="11"
                              Margin="0,8,0,4"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Border Background="{StaticResource StationeersOrangeBrush}"
                               Padding="8,4" CornerRadius="2" Margin="0,0,4,0">
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Category}" 
                                      Foreground="White" FontSize="11" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                        </Border>
                        <Border Background="{StaticResource StationeersBlueBrush}"
                               Padding="8,4" CornerRadius="2">
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SubCategory}" 
                                      Foreground="White" FontSize="11" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                        </Border>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Border>

            <!-- Operational Details Section -->
            <Border Background="{StaticResource StationeersGrayBrush}" 
                   Padding="16" CornerRadius="4" Margin="0,0,0,16">
                <StackPanel>
                    <Grid Margin="0,0,0,12">
                        <TextBlock Text="⚙️ Operational Details" 
                                  Style="{StaticResource CategoryHeaderTextStyle}"
                                  HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right">
                            <Button Content="＋ Add Detail" 
                                   Click="AddOperationalDetail_Click"
                                   Style="{StaticResource StationeersButtonStyle}"
                                   Padding="8,4" FontSize="11" Margin="0,0,4,0"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Grid>

                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OperationalDetails}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Background="{StaticResource StationeersDarkGrayBrush}"
                                       Padding="12" Margin="0,0,0,8" CornerRadius="3"
                                       BorderBrush="{StaticResource StationeersOrangeBrush}"
                                       BorderThickness="1">
                                    <Grid>
                                        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                                            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                                            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                                        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                                        <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,8">
                                            <TextBlock Text="Title:" 
                                                      Style="{StaticResource PropertyLabelStyle}"
                                                      Margin="0" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                                            <Button Content="🗑️" 
                                                   Click="RemoveOperationalDetail_Click"
                                                   Tag="{Binding}"
                                                   Background="Transparent"
                                                   BorderThickness="0"
                                                   Foreground="#CC4444"
                                                   Padding="6,2"
                                                   Margin="8,0,0,0"
                                                   ToolTip="Remove this detail"
                                                   HorizontalAlignment="Right"/>
                                        </StackPanel>

                                        <TextBox Grid.Row="1" 
                                                Text="{Binding Title, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                ui:ControlHelper.PlaceholderText="Detail title..."
                                                FontWeight="SemiBold"
                                                Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Text="Description:" 
                                                  Style="{StaticResource PropertyLabelStyle}"/>
                                        <TextBox Grid.Row="2" 
                                                Text="{Binding Description, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                ui:ControlHelper.PlaceholderText="Detailed description..."
                                                AcceptsReturn="True"
                                                TextWrapping="Wrap"
                                                MinHeight="60"
                                                VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                                                Margin="0,28,0,0"/>
                                    </Grid>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>

                    <TextBlock Text="No operational details defined. Click '＋ Add Detail' to create one."
                              Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersWhiteBrush}"
                              FontStyle="Italic"
                              Opacity="0.5"
                              TextAlignment="Center"
                              Margin="0,16"
                              Visibility="{Binding OperationalDetails.Count, 
                                  Converter={StaticResource CountToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Border>

            <!-- Slots Section -->
            <Border Background="{StaticResource StationeersGrayBrush}" 
                   Padding="16" CornerRadius="4" Margin="0,0,0,16">
                <StackPanel>
                    <Grid Margin="0,0,0,12">
                        <TextBlock Text="🎰 Slots" 
                                  Style="{StaticResource CategoryHeaderTextStyle}"
                                  HorizontalAlignment="Left"/>
                        <Button Content="＋ Add Slot" 
                               Click="AddSlot_Click"
                               Style="{StaticResource StationeersButtonStyle}"
                               Padding="8,4" FontSize="11"
                               HorizontalAlignment="Right"/>
                    </Grid>

                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Slots}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Background="{StaticResource StationeersDarkGrayBrush}"
                                       Padding="12" Margin="0,0,0,8" CornerRadius="3">
                                    <Grid>
                                        <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                            <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                            <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                            <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                        </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Margin="0,0,8,0">
                                            <TextBlock Text="Name:" Style="{StaticResource PropertyLabelStyle}"/>
                                            <TextBox Text="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                    ui:ControlHelper.PlaceholderText="Slot name..."/>
                                        </StackPanel>

                                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Margin="0,0,8,0">
                                            <TextBlock Text="Type:" Style="{StaticResource PropertyLabelStyle}"/>
                                            <TextBox Text="{Binding Type, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                    ui:ControlHelper.PlaceholderText="Slot type..."/>
                                        </StackPanel>

                                        <Button Grid.Column="2" Content="🗑️" 
                                               Click="RemoveSlot_Click"
                                               Tag="{Binding}"
                                               Background="Transparent"
                                               BorderThickness="0"
                                               Foreground="#CC4444"
                                               Padding="6,2"
                                               VerticalAlignment="Center"
                                               ToolTip="Remove this slot"/>
                                    </Grid>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>

                    <TextBlock Text="No slots defined."
                              Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersWhiteBrush}"
                              FontStyle="Italic"
                              Opacity="0.5"
                              TextAlignment="Center"
                              Margin="0,8"
                              Visibility="{Binding Slots.Count, 
                                  Converter={StaticResource CountToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Border>

            <!-- Logic Descriptions Section -->
            <Border Background="{StaticResource StationeersGrayBrush}" 
                   Padding="16" CornerRadius="4">
                <StackPanel>
                    <TextBlock Text="🔌 Logic Descriptions" 
                              Style="{StaticResource CategoryHeaderTextStyle}"
                              Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                    
                    <TextBlock Text="Logic descriptions are managed in the dedicated Logic Editor (Coming Soon)"
                              Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersLightBlueBrush}"
                              FontStyle="Italic"
                              TextWrapping="Wrap"
                              Margin="0,8"/>
                    
                    <TextBlock Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersWhiteBrush}"
                              Opacity="0.7"
                              FontSize="11"
                              Margin="0,8">
                        <Run Text="Logic Types Defined:"/>
                        <Run Text="{Binding LogicDescriptions.Count, FallbackValue=0}" 
                             Foreground="{StaticResource StationeersOrangeBrush}"
                             FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                    </TextBlock>
                </StackPanel>
            </Border>
        </StackPanel>
    </ScrollViewer>
</UserControl>

```

```
using StationpediaEditor.Models;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;

namespace StationpediaEditor.Views
{
    public partial class DeviceEditorView : UserControl
    {
        public DeviceEditorView()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
        }

        private void AddOperationalDetail_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            if (DataContext is DeviceDescription device)
            {
                device.OperationalDetails ??= new System.Collections.Generic.List<OperationalDetail>();
                device.OperationalDetails.Add(new OperationalDetail
                {
                    Title = "New Detail",
                    Description = "Enter description here..."
                });
                
                // Refresh binding
                DataContext = null;
                DataContext = device;
            }
        }

        private void RemoveOperationalDetail_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is Button button && button.Tag is OperationalDetail detail && 
                DataContext is DeviceDescription device)
            {
                device.OperationalDetails?.Remove(detail);
                
                // Refresh binding
                var temp = DataContext;
                DataContext = null;
                DataContext = temp;
            }
        }

        private void AddSlot_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            if (DataContext is DeviceDescription device)
            {
                device.Slots ??= new System.Collections.Generic.List<SlotDescription>();
                device.Slots.Add(new SlotDescription
                {
                    Name = "New Slot",
                    Type = "None"
                });
                
                // Refresh binding
                DataContext = null;
                DataContext = device;
            }
        }

        private void RemoveSlot_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is Button button && button.Tag is SlotDescription slot && 
                DataContext is DeviceDescription device)
            {
                device.Slots?.Remove(slot);
                
                // Refresh binding
                var temp = DataContext;
                DataContext = null;
                DataContext = temp;
            }
        }
    }
}

```

using System;
using System.Globalization;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Data;

namespace StationpediaEditor.Converters
{
    public class CountToVisibilityConverter : IValueConverter
    {
        public object Convert(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            if (value is int count)
            {
                return count == 0 ? Visibility.Visible : Visibility.Collapsed;
            }
            return Visibility.Collapsed;
        }

        public object ConvertBack(object value, Type targetType, object parameter, CultureInfo culture)
        {
            throw new NotImplementedException();
        }
    }
}

```

```
# Stationpedia Editor

A modern GUI application for editing Stationeers `descriptions.json` files.

## Features

- 🎨 **Stationeers-themed UI** - Orange, blue, and white color scheme
- 📂 **Category Navigation** - Devices organized by type and subcategory
- 🔍 **Search & Filter** - Quick device lookup
- ✏️ **Visual Editor** - Edit device properties with forms
- 💾 **Auto-backup** - Creates backups before saving
- ⚙️ **Operational Details** - Easy add/edit/remove interface
- 🎰 **Slot Management** - Manage device slots visually

## Building the Application

### Prerequisites
- .NET 8 SDK or later
- Windows 10/11

### Build Steps

1. Open terminal in the `StationpediaEditor` directory
2. Run: `dotnet restore`
3. Run: `dotnet build -c Release`
4. The executable will be in `bin/Release/net8.0-windows/`

### Creating a Single EXE

To create a single-file executable:

```powershell
dotnet publish -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:IncludeNativeLibrariesForSelfExtract=true
```

The self-contained EXE will be in `bin/Release/net8.0-windows/win-x64/publish/`

## Usage

1. Launch `StationpediaEditor.exe`
2. Click **"📁 Open File"** and select your `descriptions.json`
3. Browse categories or search for devices
4. Select a device to edit its properties
5. Click **"💾 Save"** when done

## Technology Stack

- **Framework**: .NET 8 WPF
- **UI Library**: ModernWPF
- **MVVM**: CommunityToolkit.Mvvm
- **JSON**: Newtonsoft.Json

## Screenshots

The app features:
- Dark theme with Stationeers orange/blue accents
- Three-panel layout (Categories | Devices | Editor)
- Real-time search and filtering
- Visual tags showing device categories
- Form-based editing with validation

## License

Created for the Stationeers modding community.

```

# Build and Run Instructions

## Quick Start

### Option 1: Run Directly (Development)
```powershell
cd "c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaEditor"
dotnet run
```

### Option 2: Build Release Version
```powershell
cd "c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaEditor"
dotnet build -c Release
```
Executable location: `bin\Release\net8.0-windows\StationpediaEditor.exe`

### Option 3: Publish Single-File EXE (Recommended)
```powershell
cd "c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaEditor"
dotnet publish -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:IncludeNativeLibrariesForSelfExtract=true -p:EnableCompressionInSingleFile=true
```
Executable location: `bin\Release\net8.0-windows\win-x64\publish\StationpediaEditor.exe`

This creates a **single portable EXE** (~80MB) that includes everything needed to run.

## First Launch

1. Run the EXE
2. Click "📁 Open File"
3. Navigate to: `c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\descriptions.json`
4. The file will load and you can start editing!

## Tips

- **Backups**: The app automatically creates timestamped backups when saving
- **Search**: Use Ctrl+F or click the search box to filter devices
- **Categories**: Click categories in the left panel to filter by type
- **Save Often**: Click "💾 Save" regularly to preserve your changes

## Troubleshooting

### "Cannot find .NET runtime"
Install .NET 8 Desktop Runtime from: https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download/dotnet/8.0

### "App won't start"
- Make sure you're on Windows 10/11
- Try running as administrator
- Check Windows Defender hasn't quarantined it

### "Can't save file"
- Check the descriptions.json isn't open in another program
- Verify you have write permissions to the folder
- Look for backup files (*.backup_*) if save fails

- newString:

```
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using Newtonsoft.Json.Linq;
using StationpediaEditor.Models;
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;

namespace StationpediaEditor.Services
{
    public class JsonService
    {
        private DescriptionsFile? _loadedFile;

        public List<DeviceDescription> LoadDescriptions(string filePath)
        {
            try
            {
                var jsonText = File.ReadAllText(filePath);
                
                // Parse as the full file structure
                _loadedFile = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<DescriptionsFile>(jsonText);
                
                return _loadedFile?.Devices ?? new List<DeviceDescription>();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                throw new Exception($"Failed to load descriptions.json: {ex.Message}", ex);
            }
        }

        public void SaveDescriptions(string filePath, List<DeviceDescription> devices)
        {
            try
            {
                // Create backup
                if (File.Exists(filePath))
                {
                    var backupPath = $"{filePath}.backup_{DateTime.Now:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}";
                    File.Copy(filePath, backupPath, true);
                }

                // Update devices in the loaded file structure
                if (_loadedFile != null)
                {
                    _loadedFile.Devices = devices;
                }
                else
                {
                    _loadedFile = new DescriptionsFile { Devices = devices };
                }

                // Serialize with indentation
                var settings = new JsonSerializerSettings
                {
                    Formatting = Formatting.Indented,
                    NullValueHandling = NullValueHandling.Ignore
                };

                var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(_loadedFile, settings);
                File.WriteAllText(filePath, json);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                throw new Exception($"Failed to save descriptions.json: {ex.Message}", ex);
            }
        }

        public Dictionary<string, List<DeviceDescription>> GroupByCategory(List<DeviceDescription> devices)
        {
            return devices
                .GroupBy(d => d.Category)
                .ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.ToList());
        }

        public Dictionary<string, List<DeviceDescription>> GroupBySubCategory(List<DeviceDescription> devices)
        {
            return devices
                .GroupBy(d => d.SubCategory)
                .ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.ToList());
        }
    }
}
```

- oldString:

```
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using Newtonsoft.Json.Linq;
using StationpediaEditor.Models;
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;

namespace StationpediaEditor.Services
{
    public class JsonService
    {
        public List<DeviceDescription> LoadDescriptions(string filePath)
        {
            try
            {
                var jsonText = File.ReadAllText(filePath);
                
                // Parse as array directly (the file is a JSON array, not an object with "devices" property)
                var devices = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<List<DeviceDescription>>(jsonText);
                
                return devices ?? new List<DeviceDescription>();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                throw new Exception($"Failed to load descriptions.json: {ex.Message}", ex);
            }
        }

        public void SaveDescriptions(string filePath, List<DeviceDescription> devices)
        {
            try
            {
                // Create backup
                if (File.Exists(filePath))
                {
                    var backupPath = $"{filePath}.backup_{DateTime.Now:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}";
                    File.Copy(filePath, backupPath, true);
                }

                // Serialize with indentation
                var settings = new JsonSerializerSettings
                {
                    Formatting = Formatting.Indented,
                    NullValueHandling = NullValueHandling.Ignore,
                    DefaultValueHandling = DefaultValueHandling.Ignore
                };

                var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(devices, settings);
                File.WriteAllText(filePath, json);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                throw new Exception($"Failed to save descriptions.json: {ex.Message}", ex);
            }
        }

        public Dictionary<string, List<DeviceDescription>> GroupByCategory(List<DeviceDescription> devices)
        {
            return devices
                .GroupBy(d => d.Category)
                .ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.ToList());
        }

        public Dictionary<string, List<DeviceDescription>> GroupBySubCategory(List<DeviceDescription> devices)
        {
            return devices
                .GroupBy(d => d.SubCategory)
                .ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.ToList());
        }
    }
}
```

```
"""Data models for device descriptions"""

class DeviceDescription:
    """Represents a single device description"""
    
    def __init__(self, data: dict):
        self.data = data
        self.device_key = data.get("deviceKey", "")
        self.name = data.get("name", "")
        self.description = data.get("description", "")
        self.operational_details = data.get("OperationalDetails", [])
        self.slots = data.get("slots", [])
        self.category = self._determine_category()
        self.subcategory = self._determine_subcategory()
    
    def _determine_category(self) -> str:
        """Auto-detect category from device key prefix"""
        key = self.device_key
        if key.startswith("ThingStructure"):
            return "Structures"
        elif key.startswith("ThingBattery") or key.startswith("ThingGenerator") or key.startswith("ThingTransformer"):
            return "Power"
        elif key.startswith("ThingAtmos") or key.startswith("ThingGas") or "Pipe" in key:
            return "Atmospheric"
        elif key.startswith("ThingFabricator") or key.startswith("ThingManufacturing"):
            return "Manufacturing"
        elif key.startswith("ThingCircuit") or "Logic" in key:
            return "Logic & Circuits"
        elif key.startswith("ThingTool") or key.startswith("ThingItem"):
            return "Tools & Items"
        elif key.startswith("ThingMotherboard") or "Computer" in key:
            return "Computer & Data"
        else:
            return "Other"
    
    def _determine_subcategory(self) -> str:
        """Auto-detect subcategory from device key"""
        key = self.device_key
        if "Door" in key:
            return "Doors"
        elif "Window" in key:
            return "Windows"
        elif "Chute" in key:
            return "Chutes"
        elif "Console" in key:
            return "Consoles"
        elif "Tank" in key:
            return "Tanks"
        elif "Pump" in key:
            return "Pumps"
        elif "Filter" in key or "Sorter" in key:
            return "Filtering"
        elif "Sensor" in key:
            return "Sensors"
        else:
            return "General"
    
    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
        """Convert back to dictionary"""
        return self.data
    
    def update_field(self, field: str, value):
        """Update a field in the data"""
        self.data[field] = value
        # Update instance attributes
        if field == "deviceKey":
            self.device_key = value
            self.category = self._determine_category()
            self.subcategory = self._determine_subcategory()
        elif field == "name":
            self.name = value
        elif field == "description":
            self.description = value
        elif field == "OperationalDetails":
            self.operational_details = value
        elif field == "slots":
            self.slots = value


class DescriptionsFile:
    """Represents the complete descriptions.json file"""
    
    def __init__(self, data: dict):
        self.generic_descriptions = data.get("genericDescriptions", {})
        self.devices = [DeviceDescription(d) for d in data.get("devices", [])]
    
    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
        """Convert back to dictionary"""
        return {
            "genericDescriptions": self.generic_descriptions,
            "devices": [device.to_dict() for device in self.devices]
        }
    
    def get_categories(self) -> dict:
        """Get devices grouped by category"""
        categories = {}
        for device in self.devices:
            if device.category not in categories:
                categories[device.category] = []
            categories[device.category].append(device)
        return categories

```

"""JSON file service for loading and saving descriptions"""
import json
import os
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Optional
from models import DescriptionsFile


class JsonService:
    """Handles loading and saving of descriptions.json"""
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.current_file: Optional[DescriptionsFile] = None
        self.file_path: Optional[str] = None
    
    def load_file(self, file_path: str) -> DescriptionsFile:
        """Load descriptions from JSON file"""
        with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            data = json.load(f)
        
        self.file_path = file_path
        self.current_file = DescriptionsFile(data)
        return self.current_file
    
    def save_file(self, file_path: Optional[str] = None) -> bool:
        """Save descriptions to JSON file with backup"""
        if not self.current_file:
            return False
        
        save_path = file_path or self.file_path
        if not save_path:
            return False
        
        # Create backup
        if os.path.exists(save_path):
            backup_path = f"{save_path}.backup.{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}"
            with open(save_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                backup_data = f.read()
            with open(backup_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                f.write(backup_data)
        
        # Save new data
        with open(save_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            json.dump(self.current_file.to_dict(), f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
        
        self.file_path = save_path
        return True

```

"""Custom themed UI components for Stationeers Editor"""
import customtkinter as ctk
from config import COLORS, FONT_FAMILY
from typing import Callable, List, Optional


class StationeersButton(ctk.CTkButton):
    """Themed button with orange accent"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, text="", command=None, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(
            master,
            text=text,
            command=command,
            fg_color=COLORS["orange"],
            hover_color=COLORS["orange_hover"],
            text_color=COLORS["bg_dark"],
            font=(FONT_FAMILY, 13, "bold"),
            corner_radius=6,
            border_width=0,
            **kwargs
        )


class StationeersSecondaryButton(ctk.CTkButton):
    """Themed button with blue accent"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, text="", command=None, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(
            master,
            text=text,
            command=command,
            fg_color=COLORS["blue_light"],
            hover_color=COLORS["blue_dark"],
            text_color=COLORS["text_primary"],
            font=(FONT_FAMILY, 12),
            corner_radius=6,
            border_width=0,
            **kwargs
        )


class StationeersEntry(ctk.CTkEntry):
    """Themed entry field"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, placeholder="", **kwargs):
        super().__init__(
            master,
            placeholder_text=placeholder,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            border_color=COLORS["border"],
            border_width=2,
            text_color=COLORS["text_primary"],
            placeholder_text_color=COLORS["text_secondary"],
            font=(FONT_FAMILY, 12),
            corner_radius=4,
            **kwargs
        )


class StationeersTextBox(ctk.CTkTextbox):
    """Themed multi-line text box"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(
            master,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            border_color=COLORS["border"],
            border_width=2,
            text_color=COLORS["text_primary"],
            font=(FONT_FAMILY, 12),
            corner_radius=4,
            **kwargs
        )


class StationeersLabel(ctk.CTkLabel):
    """Themed label"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, text="", bold=False, size=12, color=None, **kwargs):
        weight = "bold" if bold else "normal"
        text_color = color or COLORS["text_primary"]
        super().__init__(
            master,
            text=text,
            text_color=text_color,
            font=(FONT_FAMILY, size, weight),
            **kwargs
        )


class StationeersFrame(ctk.CTkFrame):
    """Themed frame with optional border"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, border=False, **kwargs):
        border_config = {
            "border_color": COLORS["border"],
            "border_width": 2
        } if border else {}
        
        super().__init__(
            master,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_light"],
            corner_radius=8,
            **border_config,
            **kwargs
        )


class StationeersScrollableFrame(ctk.CTkScrollableFrame):
    """Themed scrollable frame"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(
            master,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_light"],
            corner_radius=8,
            border_width=2,
            border_color=COLORS["border"],
            **kwargs
        )


class CategoryTreeItem(ctk.CTkFrame):
    """Category item in the tree view"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, text: str, count: int, on_click: Callable, is_selected=False):
        bg_color = COLORS["orange"] if is_selected else COLORS["bg_light"]
        text_color = COLORS["bg_dark"] if is_selected else COLORS["text_primary"]
        
        super().__init__(
            master,
            fg_color=bg_color,
            corner_radius=4,
            height=32
        )
        
        self.on_click = on_click
        self.text_value = text
        self.is_selected = is_selected
        
        # Clickable area
        self.bind("<Button-1>", lambda e: self.on_click(self.text_value))
        
        # Label
        label = ctk.CTkLabel(
            self,
            text=f"{text} ({count})",
            text_color=text_color,
            font=(FONT_FAMILY, 12),
            anchor="w"
        )
        label.pack(side="left", fill="x", expand=True, padx=12, pady=6)
        label.bind("<Button-1>", lambda e: self.on_click(self.text_value))


class DeviceListItem(ctk.CTkFrame):
    """Device item in the list"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, device_name: str, device_key: str, on_click: Callable, is_selected=False):
        bg_color = COLORS["blue_light"] if is_selected else COLORS["bg_medium"]
        
        super().__init__(
            master,
            fg_color=bg_color,
            corner_radius=4,
            height=60
        )
        
        self.device_key = device_key
        self.on_click = on_click
        
        # Clickable area
        self.bind("<Button-1>", lambda e: self.on_click(self.device_key))
        
        # Device name
        name_label = StationeersLabel(
            self,
            text=device_name,
            bold=True,
            size=13
        )
        name_label.pack(anchor="w", padx=12, pady=(8, 2))
        name_label.bind("<Button-1>", lambda e: self.on_click(self.device_key))
        
        # Device key
        key_label = StationeersLabel(
            self,
            text=device_key,
            size=10,
            color=COLORS["text_secondary"]
        )
        key_label.pack(anchor="w", padx=12, pady=(0, 8))
        key_label.bind("<Button-1>", lambda e: self.on_click(self.device_key))
