"""Main application window"""
import customtkinter as ctk
import os
from typing import Optional
from config import COLORS, WINDOW_TITLE, WINDOW_SIZE, DESCRIPTIONS_JSON_PATH, FONT_FAMILY
from components import *
from models import DeviceDescription, DescriptionsFile
from json_service import JsonService


class DeviceEditorPanel(ctk.CTkFrame):
    """Right panel for editing device details"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, on_save: Callable):
        super().__init__(
            master,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=0
        )
        
        self.current_device: Optional[DeviceDescription] = None
        self.on_save = on_save
        self.widgets = {}
        
        # Header
        header = StationeersFrame(self, border=False)
        header.pack(fill="x", padx=16, pady=(16, 8))
        
        self.title_label = StationeersLabel(
            header,
            text="Select a device to edit",
            bold=True,
            size=16,
            color=COLORS["orange"]
        )
        self.title_label.pack(side="left", padx=12, pady=12)
        
        # Scrollable content
        self.scroll_frame = StationeersScrollableFrame(self)
        self.scroll_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=16, pady=(8, 16))
    
    def clear(self):
        """Clear all widgets"""
        for widget in self.scroll_frame.winfo_children():
            widget.destroy()
        self.widgets = {}
        self.current_device = None
        self.title_label.configure(text="Select a device to edit")
    
    def load_device(self, device: DeviceDescription):
        """Load device for editing"""
        self.clear()
        self.current_device = device
        self.title_label.configure(text=device.name or device.device_key)
        
        # Device Key
        self._add_field("Device Key", "deviceKey", device.device_key)
        
        # Name
        self._add_field("Name", "name", device.name)
        
        # Description
        self._add_text_field("Description", "description", device.description)
        
        # Operational Details section
        self._add_operational_details()
        
        # Slots section
        self._add_slots()
        
        # Save button
        save_btn = StationeersButton(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text="💾 Save Changes",
            command=self._save_changes,
            height=40
        )
        save_btn.pack(fill="x", pady=16)
    
    def _add_field(self, label: str, key: str, value: str):
        """Add a text entry field"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=13
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        entry = StationeersEntry(self.scroll_frame)
        entry.insert(0, value or "")
        entry.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[key] = entry
    
    def _add_text_field(self, label: str, key: str, value: str):
        """Add a multi-line text field"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=13
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        textbox = StationeersTextBox(self.scroll_frame, height=100)
        textbox.insert("1.0", value or "")
        textbox.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[key] = textbox
    
    def _add_operational_details(self):
        """Add operational details section"""
        # Header with add button
        header_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(self.scroll_frame, fg_color="transparent")
        header_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(16, 8))
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header_frame,
            text="Operational Details",
            bold=True,
            size=14,
            color=COLORS["orange"]
        ).pack(side="left")
        
        add_btn = StationeersSecondaryButton(
            header_frame,
            text="+ Add",
            command=self._add_operational_detail_entry,
            width=80,
            height=28
        )
        add_btn.pack(side="right")
        
        # Container for entries
        self.op_details_container = ctk.CTkFrame(
            self.scroll_frame,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"],
            corner_radius=6
        )
        self.op_details_container.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        
        # Load existing operational details
        self.widgets["OperationalDetails"] = []
        for i, detail in enumerate(self.current_device.operational_details):
            self._add_operational_detail_entry(detail)
    
    def _add_operational_detail_entry(self, value=""):
        """Add a single operational detail entry"""
        entry_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(
            self.op_details_container,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=4
        )
        entry_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=4)
        
        entry = StationeersEntry(entry_frame, placeholder="Enter operational detail...")
        entry.insert(0, value)
        entry.pack(side="left", fill="x", expand=True, padx=8, pady=8)
        
        remove_btn = ctk.CTkButton(
            entry_frame,
            text="✕",
            command=lambda: self._remove_operational_detail(entry_frame, entry),
            width=32,
            height=32,
            fg_color=COLORS["error"],
            hover_color="#C93D36",
            font=(FONT_FAMILY, 14, "bold")
        )
        remove_btn.pack(side="right", padx=8, pady=8)
        
        self.widgets["OperationalDetails"].append(entry)
    
    def _remove_operational_detail(self, frame, entry):
        """Remove an operational detail entry"""
        self.widgets["OperationalDetails"].remove(entry)
        frame.destroy()
    
    def _add_slots(self):
        """Add slots section"""
        # Header with add button
        header_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(self.scroll_frame, fg_color="transparent")
        header_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(16, 8))
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header_frame,
            text="Slots",
            bold=True,
            size=14,
            color=COLORS["orange"]
        ).pack(side="left")
        
        add_btn = StationeersSecondaryButton(
            header_frame,
            text="+ Add Slot",
            command=self._add_slot_entry,
            width=100,
            height=28
        )
        add_btn.pack(side="right")
        
        # Container for slots
        self.slots_container = ctk.CTkFrame(
            self.scroll_frame,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"],
            corner_radius=6
        )
        self.slots_container.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        
        # Load existing slots
        self.widgets["slots"] = []
        for slot in self.current_device.slots:
            self._add_slot_entry(slot)
    
    def _add_slot_entry(self, slot_data=None):
        """Add a single slot entry"""
        slot_data = slot_data or {"slotName": "", "description": ""}
        
        slot_frame = StationeersFrame(self.slots_container, border=False)
        slot_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=4)
        
        # Slot name
        StationeersLabel(slot_frame, text="Slot Name:", size=11).pack(anchor="w", padx=8, pady=(8, 2))
        name_entry = StationeersEntry(slot_frame)
        name_entry.insert(0, slot_data.get("slotName", ""))
        name_entry.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
        
        # Description
        StationeersLabel(slot_frame, text="Description:", size=11).pack(anchor="w", padx=8, pady=(4, 2))
        desc_entry = StationeersEntry(slot_frame)
        desc_entry.insert(0, slot_data.get("description", ""))
        desc_entry.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
        
        # Remove button
        remove_btn = ctk.CTkButton(
            slot_frame,
            text="Remove Slot",
            command=lambda: self._remove_slot(slot_frame, (name_entry, desc_entry)),
            fg_color=COLORS["error"],
            hover_color="#C93D36",
            height=28,
            font=(FONT_FAMILY, 11)
        )
        remove_btn.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(4, 8))
        
        self.widgets["slots"].append((name_entry, desc_entry))
    
    def _remove_slot(self, frame, entries):
        """Remove a slot entry"""
        self.widgets["slots"].remove(entries)
        frame.destroy()
    
    def _save_changes(self):
        """Save all changes to current device"""
        if not self.current_device:
            return
        
        # Update simple fields
        for key in ["deviceKey", "name"]:
            if key in self.widgets:
                self.current_device.update_field(key, self.widgets[key].get())
        
        # Update description
        if "description" in self.widgets:
            self.current_device.update_field(
                "description",
                self.widgets["description"].get("1.0", "end-1c")
            )
        
        # Update operational details
        op_details = [
            entry.get()
            for entry in self.widgets.get("OperationalDetails", [])
            if entry.get().strip()
        ]
        self.current_device.update_field("OperationalDetails", op_details)
        
        # Update slots
        slots = [
            {
                "slotName": name_entry.get(),
                "description": desc_entry.get()
            }
            for name_entry, desc_entry in self.widgets.get("slots", [])
            if name_entry.get().strip()
        ]
        self.current_device.update_field("slots", slots)
        
        # Notify parent
        self.on_save()


class StationpediaEditor(ctk.CTk):
    """Main application window"""
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        
        self.title(WINDOW_TITLE)
        self.geometry(WINDOW_SIZE)
        self._set_appearance()
        
        self.json_service = JsonService()
        self.descriptions_file: Optional[DescriptionsFile] = None
        self.selected_category: Optional[str] = None
        self.selected_device_key: Optional[str] = None
        
        self._create_ui()
        self._load_initial_file()
    
    def _set_appearance(self):
        """Set appearance mode and colors"""
        ctk.set_appearance_mode("dark")
        ctk.set_default_color_theme("blue")
        self.configure(fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"])
    
    def _create_ui(self):
        """Create the UI layout"""
        # Top bar with buttons
        top_bar = StationeersFrame(self, border=True)
        top_bar.pack(fill="x", padx=16, pady=16)
        
        StationeersLabel(
            top_bar,
            text="🚀 " + WINDOW_TITLE,
            bold=True,
            size=16,
            color=COLORS["orange"]
        ).pack(side="left", padx=16, pady=12)
        
        StationeersButton(
            top_bar,
            text="💾 Save File",
            command=self._save_file,
            width=120,
            height=36
        ).pack(side="right", padx=16, pady=12)
        
        StationeersSecondaryButton(
            top_bar,
            text="🔄 Reload",
            command=self._reload_file,
            width=100,
            height=36
        ).pack(side="right", padx=8, pady=12)
        
        # Main content area - 3 columns
        content = ctk.CTkFrame(self, fg_color="transparent")
        content.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=16, pady=(0, 16))
        
        # Left panel - Categories
        left_panel = StationeersFrame(content, border=True)
        left_panel.pack(side="left", fill="both", padx=(0, 8), expand=False)
        left_panel.configure(width=250)
        
        StationeersLabel(
            left_panel,
            text="Categories",
            bold=True,
            size=14
        ).pack(padx=16, pady=(16, 8))
        
        self.category_scroll = StationeersScrollableFrame(left_panel)
        self.category_scroll.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=12, pady=(0, 12))
        
        # Middle panel - Device list
        middle_panel = StationeersFrame(content, border=True)
        middle_panel.pack(side="left", fill="both", padx=8, expand=False)
        middle_panel.configure(width=350)
        
        middle_header = ctk.CTkFrame(middle_panel, fg_color="transparent")
        middle_header.pack(fill="x", padx=16, pady=(16, 8))
        
        StationeersLabel(
            middle_header,
            text="Devices",
            bold=True,
            size=14
        ).pack(side="left")
        
        self.device_count_label = StationeersLabel(
            middle_header,
            text="(0)",
            size=12,
            color=COLORS["text_secondary"]
        )
        self.device_count_label.pack(side="left", padx=8)
        
        # Search box
        self.search_entry = StationeersEntry(
            middle_panel,
            placeholder="🔍 Search devices..."
        )
        self.search_entry.pack(fill="x", padx=16, pady=(0, 12))
        self.search_entry.bind("<KeyRelease>", lambda e: self._filter_devices())
        
        self.device_scroll = StationeersScrollableFrame(middle_panel)
        self.device_scroll.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=12, pady=(0, 12))
        
        # Right panel - Editor
        self.editor_panel = DeviceEditorPanel(
            content,
            on_save=self._on_device_saved
        )
        self.editor_panel.pack(side="left", fill="both", expand=True, padx=(8, 0))
    
    def _load_initial_file(self):
        """Load descriptions.json on startup"""
        try:
            if os.path.exists(DESCRIPTIONS_JSON_PATH):
                self.descriptions_file = self.json_service.load_file(DESCRIPTIONS_JSON_PATH)
                self._populate_categories()
                self._show_status("Loaded successfully", COLORS["success"])
            else:
                self._show_status(f"File not found: {DESCRIPTIONS_JSON_PATH}", COLORS["error"])
        except Exception as e:
            self._show_status(f"Error loading file: {str(e)}", COLORS["error"])
    
    def _populate_categories(self):
        """Populate the category tree"""
        # Clear existing
        for widget in self.category_scroll.winfo_children():
            widget.destroy()
        
        if not self.descriptions_file:
            return
        
        categories = self.descriptions_file.get_categories()
        
        # Add "All Devices" option
        total_count = len(self.descriptions_file.devices)
        all_item = CategoryTreeItem(
            self.category_scroll,
            "All Devices",
            total_count,
            self._on_category_selected,
            self.selected_category is None
        )
        all_item.pack(fill="x", pady=2)
        
        # Add each category
        for category, devices in sorted(categories.items()):
            item = CategoryTreeItem(
                self.category_scroll,
                category,
                len(devices),
                self._on_category_selected,
                self.selected_category == category
            )
            item.pack(fill="x", pady=2)
    
    def _on_category_selected(self, category: str):
        """Handle category selection"""
        if category == "All Devices":
            self.selected_category = None
        else:
            self.selected_category = category
        
        self._populate_categories()
        self._filter_devices()
    
    def _filter_devices(self):
        """Filter and display devices"""
        # Clear existing
        for widget in self.device_scroll.winfo_children():
            widget.destroy()
        
        if not self.descriptions_file:
            return
        
        search_text = self.search_entry.get().lower()
        
        # Filter devices
        devices = self.descriptions_file.devices
        if self.selected_category:
            devices = [d for d in devices if d.category == self.selected_category]
        
        if search_text:
            devices = [
                d for d in devices
                if search_text in d.name.lower() or search_text in d.device_key.lower()
            ]
        
        # Update count
        self.device_count_label.configure(text=f"({len(devices)})")
        
        # Display devices
        for device in devices:
            item = DeviceListItem(
                self.device_scroll,
                device.name or device.device_key,
                device.device_key,
                self._on_device_selected,
                self.selected_device_key == device.device_key
            )
            item.pack(fill="x", pady=2)
    
    def _on_device_selected(self, device_key: str):
        """Handle device selection"""
        self.selected_device_key = device_key
        self._filter_devices()
        
        # Load in editor
        device = next(
            (d for d in self.descriptions_file.devices if d.device_key == device_key),
            None
        )
        if device:
            self.editor_panel.load_device(device)
    
    def _on_device_saved(self):
        """Handle device save"""
        self._show_status("Changes saved locally. Click 'Save File' to persist.", COLORS["success"])
    
    def _save_file(self):
        """Save the file"""
        try:
            if self.json_service.save_file():
                self._show_status("File saved successfully!", COLORS["success"])
            else:
                self._show_status("No file to save", COLORS["error"])
        except Exception as e:
            self._show_status(f"Error saving: {str(e)}", COLORS["error"])
    
    def _reload_file(self):
        """Reload the file"""
        self.editor_panel.clear()
        self.selected_category = None
        self.selected_device_key = None
        self._load_initial_file()
    
    def _show_status(self, message: str, color: str):
        """Show a status message"""
        # This could be enhanced with a status bar
        print(f"Status: {message}")


def main():
    """Application entry point"""
    app = StationpediaEditor()
    app.mainloop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

```

```
# Stationeers Description Editor

A beautiful, modern GUI application for editing Stationeers device descriptions.

## Features

- 🎨 **Stationeers Themed UI** - Dark blue backgrounds with orange accents matching the game's aesthetic
- 📁 **Auto-loads descriptions.json** - Automatically finds and loads your mod's descriptions file
- 🔍 **Search & Filter** - Quickly find devices by name or key
- 📂 **Category Organization** - Devices grouped by type (Structures, Power, Atmospheric, etc.)
- ✏️ **Easy Editing** - Intuitive forms for editing all device properties
- 💾 **Auto-backup** - Creates timestamped backups before saving
- 🚀 **Fast & Responsive** - Built with CustomTkinter for a modern experience

## Installation

1. Make sure Python 3.8+ is installed
2. Double-click `run.bat` to install dependencies and launch the editor

Or manually:
```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
python main.py
```

## Usage

1. The editor automatically loads `descriptions.json` from the StationpediaAscended mod
2. Browse categories in the left panel
3. Select a device from the middle panel
4. Edit properties in the right panel
5. Click "Save Changes" to update the device
6. Click "💾 Save File" in the top bar to write changes to disk

## Color Scheme

- Background Dark: `#0d1117` (Dark blue)
- Background Medium: `#161b22`
- Background Light: `#1f2937`
- Orange Primary: `#FF8932`
- Blue Dark: `#2A5D8F`
- Blue Light: `#3B7FBF`
- Border: `#FF8932` (Orange)

## Requirements

- Python 3.8+
- customtkinter 5.2.2+
- pillow 10.3.0+

```

"""Main application window"""
import customtkinter as ctk
import os
import json
from typing import Optional, Any
from config import COLORS, WINDOW_TITLE, WINDOW_SIZE, DESCRIPTIONS_JSON_PATH, FONT_FAMILY
from components import *
from models import DeviceDescription, DescriptionsFile
from json_service import JsonService


class DeviceEditorPanel(ctk.CTkFrame):
    """Right panel for editing device details - shows ALL properties dynamically"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, on_save: Callable):
        super().__init__(
            master,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=0
        )
        
        self.current_device: Optional[DeviceDescription] = None
        self.on_save = on_save
        self.widgets = {}
        
        # Header
        header = StationeersFrame(self, border=False)
        header.pack(fill="x", padx=16, pady=(16, 8))
        
        self.title_label = StationeersLabel(
            header,
            text="Select a device to edit",
            bold=True,
            size=16,
            color=COLORS["orange"]
        )
        self.title_label.pack(side="left", padx=12, pady=12)
        
        # Scrollable content
        self.scroll_frame = StationeersScrollableFrame(self)
        self.scroll_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=16, pady=(8, 16))
```

    def load_device(self, device: DeviceDescription):
        """Load device for editing - dynamically show ALL properties"""
        self.clear()
        self.current_device = device
        self.title_label.configure(text=device.name or device.device_key)
        
        # Get all properties from the device data
        data = device.data
        
        # Iterate through ALL properties and create appropriate editors
        for key, value in data.items():
            if isinstance(value, str):
                if len(value) > 100:
                    self._add_text_field(key, key, value)
                else:
                    self._add_field(key, key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, list):
                if key == "OperationalDetails":
                    self._add_operational_details()
                elif key == "slots":
                    self._add_slots()
                else:
                    self._add_list_field(key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, dict):
                self._add_dict_field(key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, bool):
                self._add_bool_field(key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, (int, float)):
                self._add_number_field(key, value)
            else:
                # Fallback for other types
                self._add_field(key, key, str(value))
        
        # Save button
        save_btn = StationeersButton(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text="💾 Save Changes",
            command=self._save_changes,
            height=40
        )
        save_btn.pack(fill="x", pady=16)

    def _add_text_field(self, label: str, key: str, value: str):
        """Add a multi-line text field"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=13
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        textbox = StationeersTextBox(self.scroll_frame, height=100)
        textbox.insert("1.0", value or "")
        textbox.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[key] = textbox
    
    def _add_bool_field(self, label: str, value: bool):
        """Add a boolean checkbox field"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=13
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        checkbox = ctk.CTkCheckBox(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=f"{label} is {'enabled' if value else 'disabled'}",
            fg_color=COLORS["orange"],
            hover_color=COLORS["orange_hover"],
            text_color=COLORS["text_primary"]
        )
        if value:
            checkbox.select()
        checkbox.pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[label] = checkbox
    
    def _add_number_field(self, label: str, value):
        """Add a number field"""
        self._add_field(label, label, str(value))
    
    def _add_list_field(self, label: str, value: list):
        """Add a list field (generic, not OperationalDetails/slots)"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=f"{label} (List)",
            bold=True,
            size=13,
            color=COLORS["blue_light"]
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        textbox = StationeersTextBox(self.scroll_frame, height=80)
        textbox.insert("1.0", json.dumps(value, indent=2))
        textbox.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[label] = textbox
    
    def _add_dict_field(self, label: str, value: dict):
        """Add a dictionary field"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=f"{label} (Object)",
            bold=True,
            size=13,
            color=COLORS["blue_light"]
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        textbox = StationeersTextBox(self.scroll_frame, height=120)
        textbox.insert("1.0", json.dumps(value, indent=2))
        textbox.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[label] = textbox

    def _save_changes(self):
        """Save all changes to current device - handle ALL property types"""
        if not self.current_device:
            return
        
        # Iterate through all widgets and update device data
        for key, widget in self.widgets.items():
            try:
                if key == "OperationalDetails":
                    # Handle operational details list
                    op_details = [
                        entry.get()
                        for entry in widget
                        if entry.get().strip()
                    ]
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, op_details)
                elif key == "slots":
                    # Handle slots list
                    slots = [
                        {
                            "slotName": name_entry.get(),
                            "description": desc_entry.get()
                        }
                        for name_entry, desc_entry in widget
                        if name_entry.get().strip()
                    ]
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, slots)
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkTextbox):
                    # Handle textbox (could be string, list, or dict)
                    value = widget.get("1.0", "end-1c")
                    # Try to parse as JSON for lists/dicts
                    try:
                        parsed_value = json.loads(value)
                        self.current_device.update_field(key, parsed_value)
                    except:
                        # Not JSON, just a string
                        self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkCheckBox):
                    # Handle checkbox
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, widget.get() == 1)
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkEntry):
                    # Handle entry - try to preserve type
                    value = widget.get()
                    original_value = self.current_device.data.get(key)
                    if isinstance(original_value, (int, float)):
                        try:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, float(value) if '.' in value else int(value))
                        except:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                    else:
                        self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"Error saving {key}: {e}")
        
        # Notify parent
        self.on_save()
```

    def _save_changes(self):
        """Save all changes to current device"""
        if not self.current_device:
            return
        
        # Update simple fields
        for key in ["deviceKey", "name"]:
            if key in self.widgets:
                self.current_device.update_field(key, self.widgets[key].get())
        
        # Update description
        if "description" in self.widgets:
            self.current_device.update_field(
                "description",
                self.widgets["description"].get("1.0", "end-1c")
            )
        
        # Update operational details
        op_details = [
            entry.get()
            for entry in self.widgets.get("OperationalDetails", [])
            if entry.get().strip()
        ]
        self.current_device.update_field("OperationalDetails", op_details)
        
        # Update slots
        slots = [
            {
                "slotName": name_entry.get(),
                "description": desc_entry.get()
            }
            for name_entry, desc_entry in self.widgets.get("slots", [])
            if name_entry.get().strip()
        ]
        self.current_device.update_field("slots", slots)
        
        # Notify parent
        self.on_save()

    def _create_ui(self):
        """Create the UI layout"""
        # Top bar with buttons
        top_bar = StationeersFrame(self, border=True)
        top_bar.pack(fill="x", padx=16, pady=16)
        
        StationeersLabel(
            top_bar,
            text="🚀 " + WINDOW_TITLE,
            bold=True,
            size=16,
            color=COLORS["orange"]
        ).pack(side="left", padx=16, pady=12)
        
        StationeersButton(
            top_bar,
            text="💾 Save File",
            command=self._save_file,
            width=120,
            height=36
        ).pack(side="right", padx=16, pady=12)
        
        StationeersSecondaryButton(
            top_bar,
            text="🔄 Reload",
            command=self._reload_file,
            width=100,
            height=36
        ).pack(side="right", padx=8, pady=12)
        
        # Main content area - 3 columns with proper weights
        self.content = ctk.CTkFrame(self, fg_color="transparent")
        self.content.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=16, pady=(0, 16))
        
        # Configure grid columns for proper scaling
        self.content.columnconfigure(0, weight=0, minsize=250)  # Categories - fixed width
        self.content.columnconfigure(1, weight=1, minsize=450)  # Devices - scalable, wider
        self.content.columnconfigure(2, weight=2, minsize=600)  # Editor - takes most space
        self.content.rowconfigure(0, weight=1)
        
        # Left panel - Categories
        left_panel = StationeersFrame(self.content, border=True)
        left_panel.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="nsew", padx=(0, 8))
        
        StationeersLabel(
            left_panel,
            text="Categories",
            bold=True,
            size=14
        ).pack(padx=16, pady=(16, 8))
        
        self.category_scroll = StationeersScrollableFrame(left_panel)
        self.category_scroll.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=12, pady=(0, 12))
        
        # Middle panel - Device list (wider now)
        middle_panel = StationeersFrame(self.content, border=True)
        middle_panel.grid(row=0, column=1, sticky="nsew", padx=8)
        
        middle_header = ctk.CTkFrame(middle_panel, fg_color="transparent")
        middle_header.pack(fill="x", padx=16, pady=(16, 8))
        
        StationeersLabel(
            middle_header,
            text="Devices",
            bold=True,
            size=14
        ).pack(side="left")
        
        self.device_count_label = StationeersLabel(
            middle_header,
            text="(0)",
            size=12,
            color=COLORS["text_secondary"]
        )
        self.device_count_label.pack(side="left", padx=8)
        
        # Search box
        self.search_entry = StationeersEntry(
            middle_panel,
            placeholder="🔍 Search devices..."
        )
        self.search_entry.pack(fill="x", padx=16, pady=(0, 12))
        self.search_entry.bind("<KeyRelease>", lambda e: self._filter_devices())
        
        self.device_scroll = StationeersScrollableFrame(middle_panel)
        self.device_scroll.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=12, pady=(0, 12))
        
        # Right panel - Editor (takes most space)
        self.editor_panel = DeviceEditorPanel(
            self.content,
            on_save=self._on_device_saved
        )
        self.editor_panel.grid(row=0, column=2, sticky="nsew", padx=(8, 0))
```

    def _filter_devices(self):
        """Filter and display devices with lazy loading for performance"""
        # Clear existing
        for widget in self.device_scroll.winfo_children():
            widget.destroy()
        
        if not self.descriptions_file:
            return
        
        search_text = self.search_entry.get().lower()
        
        # Filter devices
        devices = self.descriptions_file.devices
        if self.selected_category:
            devices = [d for d in devices if d.category == self.selected_category]
        
        if search_text:
            devices = [
                d for d in devices
                if search_text in d.name.lower() or search_text in d.device_key.lower()
            ]
        
        # Update count
        self.device_count_label.configure(text=f"({len(devices)})")
        
        # LAZY LOADING: Only show first 100 devices immediately for performance
        MAX_INITIAL = 100
        
        if len(devices) > MAX_INITIAL:
            # Show first 100
            for device in devices[:MAX_INITIAL]:
                item = DeviceListItem(
                    self.device_scroll,
                    device.name or device.device_key,
                    device.device_key,
                    self._on_device_selected,
                    self.selected_device_key == device.device_key
                )
                item.pack(fill="x", pady=2)
            
            # Add "Load More" button
            load_more_btn = StationeersSecondaryButton(
                self.device_scroll,
                text=f"📥 Load More ({len(devices) - MAX_INITIAL} remaining)",
                command=lambda: self._load_more_devices(devices, MAX_INITIAL),
                height=40
            )
            load_more_btn.pack(fill="x", pady=8, padx=8)
        else:
            # Show all devices
            for device in devices:
                item = DeviceListItem(
                    self.device_scroll,
                    device.name or device.device_key,
                    device.device_key,
                    self._on_device_selected,
                    self.selected_device_key == device.device_key
                )
                item.pack(fill="x", pady=2)
    
    def _load_more_devices(self, all_devices, current_index):
        """Load more devices incrementally"""
        BATCH_SIZE = 50
        
        # Remove the "Load More" button
        for widget in self.device_scroll.winfo_children():
            if isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkButton):
                widget.destroy()
        
        # Load next batch
        end_index = min(current_index + BATCH_SIZE, len(all_devices))
        
        for device in all_devices[current_index:end_index]:
            item = DeviceListItem(
                self.device_scroll,
                device.name or device.device_key,
                device.device_key,
                self._on_device_selected,
                self.selected_device_key == device.device_key
            )
            item.pack(fill="x", pady=2)
        
        # Add "Load More" button again if needed
        if end_index < len(all_devices):
            load_more_btn = StationeersSecondaryButton(
                self.device_scroll,
                text=f"📥 Load More ({len(all_devices) - end_index} remaining)",
                command=lambda: self._load_more_devices(all_devices, end_index),
                height=40
            )
            load_more_btn.pack(fill="x", pady=8, padx=8)
```

<summary>Tool use: **create_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- content:

```
"""Game-like preview panel for device information"""
import customtkinter as ctk
from typing import Optional
from config import COLORS, FONT_FAMILY
from components import StationeersLabel, StationeersFrame, StationeersScrollableFrame
from models import DeviceDescription


class PreviewPanel(ctk.CTkFrame):
    """Display device information in a game-like format"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, on_edit_click):
        super().__init__(
            master,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=0
        )
        
        self.on_edit_click = on_edit_click
        self.current_device: Optional[DeviceDescription] = None
        
        # Header with edit button
        header = StationeersFrame(self, border=False)
        header.pack(fill="x", padx=16, pady=(16, 8))
        
        self.title_label = StationeersLabel(
            header,
            text="Select a device to preview",
            bold=True,
            size=18,
            color=COLORS["orange"]
        )
        self.title_label.pack(side="left", padx=12, pady=12)
        
        self.edit_btn = ctk.CTkButton(
            header,
            text="✏️ Edit Mode",
            command=on_edit_click,
            fg_color=COLORS["blue_light"],
            hover_color=COLORS["blue_dark"],
            text_color=COLORS["text_primary"],
            font=(FONT_FAMILY, 12),
            corner_radius=6,
            height=32
        )
        self.edit_btn.pack(side="right", padx=12, pady=12)
        
        # Scrollable content
        self.scroll_frame = StationeersScrollableFrame(self)
        self.scroll_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=16, pady=(8, 16))
    
    def clear(self):
        """Clear preview"""
        for widget in self.scroll_frame.winfo_children():
            widget.destroy()
        self.current_device = None
        self.title_label.configure(text="Select a device to preview")
    
    def load_device(self, device: DeviceDescription):
        """Load device in preview mode"""
        self.clear()
        self.current_device = device
        
        # Device name (title)
        self.title_label.configure(text=device.name or device.device_key)
        
        # Device Key (subtle)
        if device.device_key:
            key_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(self.scroll_frame, fg_color=COLORS["info_bg"], corner_radius=6)
            key_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 16))
            
            StationeersLabel(
                key_frame,
                text=f"🔑 {device.device_key}",
                size=11,
                color=COLORS["text_dim"]
            ).pack(padx=12, pady=8)
        
        # Description
        if device.description:
            desc_frame = StationeersFrame(self.scroll_frame, border=False)
            desc_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 16))
            
            StationeersLabel(
                desc_frame,
                text="Description",
                bold=True,
                size=14,
                color=COLORS["blue_light"]
            ).pack(anchor="w", padx=4, pady=(0, 8))
            
            desc_text = ctk.CTkTextbox(
                desc_frame,
                height=80,
                fg_color=COLORS["highlight"],
                border_width=0,
                font=(FONT_FAMILY, 12),
                text_color=COLORS["text_primary"],
                wrap="word"
            )
            desc_text.insert("1.0", device.description)
            desc_text.configure(state="disabled")
            desc_text.pack(fill="x", padx=4)
        
        # Operational Details
        if device.operational_details:
            op_frame = StationeersFrame(self.scroll_frame, border=False)
            op_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 16))
            
            header = ctk.CTkFrame(op_frame, fg_color="transparent")
            header.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 12))
            
            StationeersLabel(
                header,
                text="⚙️ Operational Details",
                bold=True,
                size=14,
                color=COLORS["orange"]
            ).pack(side="left", padx=4)
            
            StationeersLabel(
                header,
                text=f"{len(device.operational_details)} items",
                size=11,
                color=COLORS["text_dim"]
            ).pack(side="left", padx=8)
            
            # Display as bullet points
            for detail in device.operational_details:
                detail_item = ctk.CTkFrame(
                    op_frame,
                    fg_color=COLORS["bg_light"],
                    corner_radius=4
                )
                detail_item.pack(fill="x", pady=2, padx=4)
                
                StationeersLabel(
                    detail_item,
                    text=f"• {detail}",
                    size=12,
                    color=COLORS["text_primary"]
                ).pack(anchor="w", padx=16, pady=10)
        
        # Slots
        if device.slots:
            slots_frame = StationeersFrame(self.scroll_frame, border=False)
            slots_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 16))
            
            header = ctk.CTkFrame(slots_frame, fg_color="transparent")
            header.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 12))
            
            StationeersLabel(
                header,
                text="📦 Slots",
                bold=True,
                size=14,
                color=COLORS["orange"]
            ).pack(side="left", padx=4)
            
            StationeersLabel(
                header,
                text=f"{len(device.slots)} slots",
                size=11,
                color=COLORS["text_dim"]
            ).pack(side="left", padx=8)
            
            # Display slots as cards
            for slot in device.slots:
                slot_card = ctk.CTkFrame(
                    slots_frame,
                    fg_color=COLORS["highlight"],
                    corner_radius=6,
                    border_width=1,
                    border_color=COLORS["border_subtle"]
                )
                slot_card.pack(fill="x", pady=4, padx=4)
                
                # Slot name
                StationeersLabel(
                    slot_card,
                    text=slot.get("slotName", "Unnamed Slot"),
                    bold=True,
                    size=13,
                    color=COLORS["blue_light"]
                ).pack(anchor="w", padx=12, pady=(10, 4))
                
                # Slot description
                if slot.get("description"):
                    StationeersLabel(
                        slot_card,
                        text=slot["description"],
                        size=11,
                        color=COLORS["text_secondary"]
                    ).pack(anchor="w", padx=12, pady=(0, 10))
        
        # Other properties (collapsible)
        other_props = {k: v for k, v in device.data.items() 
                      if k not in ["deviceKey", "name", "description", "OperationalDetails", "slots"]}
        
        if other_props:
            props_frame = StationeersFrame(self.scroll_frame, border=False)
            props_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 16))
            
            StationeersLabel(
                props_frame,
                text=f"📋 Other Properties ({len(other_props)})",
                bold=True,
                size=13,
                color=COLORS["text_secondary"]
            ).pack(anchor="w", padx=4, pady=(0, 8))
            
            # Show first few properties
            for i, (key, value) in enumerate(list(other_props.items())[:5]):
                prop_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(
                    props_frame,
                    fg_color=COLORS["bg_light"],
                    corner_radius=4
                )
                prop_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=2, padx=4)
                
                # Property name
                StationeersLabel(
                    prop_frame,
                    text=key,
                    bold=True,
                    size=11,
                    color=COLORS["blue_light"]
                ).pack(anchor="w", padx=12, pady=(6, 2))
                
                # Property value (truncated)
                value_str = str(value)
                if len(value_str) > 100:
                    value_str = value_str[:100] + "..."
                
                StationeersLabel(
                    prop_frame,
                    text=value_str,
                    size=10,
                    color=COLORS["text_secondary"]
                ).pack(anchor="w", padx=12, pady=(0, 6))
            
            if len(other_props) > 5:
                StationeersLabel(
                    props_frame,
                    text=f"... and {len(other_props) - 5} more (switch to Edit Mode to see all)",
                    size=10,
                    color=COLORS["text_dim"]
                ).pack(anchor="w", padx=8, pady=4)

```

    def _on_category_selected(self, category: str):
        """Handle category selection"""
        if category == "All Devices":
            self.selected_category = None
        else:
            self.selected_category = category
        
        self._populate_categories()
        self._filter_devices()
    
    def _debounced_filter(self):
        """Debounce search to improve performance"""
        if self.search_after_id:
            self.after_cancel(self.search_after_id)
        self.search_after_id = self.after(300, self._filter_devices)  # 300ms delay

    def _on_device_selected(self, device_key: str):
        """Handle device selection"""
        self.selected_device_key = device_key
        self._filter_devices()
        
        # Load in appropriate panel
        device = next(
            (d for d in self.descriptions_file.devices if d.device_key == device_key),
            None
        )
        if device:
            if self.preview_mode:
                self.preview_panel.load_device(device)
            else:
                self.editor_panel.load_device(device)
    
    def _toggle_mode(self):
        """Toggle between preview and edit mode"""
        self.preview_mode = not self.preview_mode
        
        if self.preview_mode:
            # Show preview, hide editor
            self.mode_btn.configure(text="🎮 Preview Mode", fg_color=COLORS["blue_light"])
            self.editor_panel.grid_remove()
            self.preview_panel.grid(row=0, column=2, sticky="nsew", padx=(8, 0))
            
            # Reload current device in preview
            if self.selected_device_key:
                device = next(
                    (d for d in self.descriptions_file.devices if d.device_key == self.selected_device_key),
                    None
                )
                if device:
                    self.preview_panel.load_device(device)
        else:
            # Show editor, hide preview
            self.mode_btn.configure(text="✏️ Edit Mode", fg_color=COLORS["orange"])
            self.preview_panel.grid_remove()
            self.editor_panel.grid(row=0, column=2, sticky="nsew", padx=(8, 0))
            
            # Reload current device in editor
            if self.selected_device_key:
                device = next(
                    (d for d in self.descriptions_file.devices if d.device_key == self.selected_device_key),
                    None
                )
                if device:
                    self.editor_panel.load_device(device)
```

    def load_device(self, device: DeviceDescription):
        """Load device for editing - show ALL properties as labeled text boxes"""
        self.clear()
        self.current_device = device
        self.title_label.configure(text=device.name or device.device_key)
        
        # Get all properties from the device data
        data = device.data
        
        # Standard fields with clear labels
        if "deviceKey" in data:
            self._add_field("Device Key", "deviceKey", str(data["deviceKey"]))
        
        if "name" in data:
            self._add_field("Name", "name", str(data["name"]))
        
        if "description" in data:
            self._add_text_field("Description", "description", str(data["description"]))
        
        # Operational Details - special handling with add/remove
        if "OperationalDetails" in data:
            self._add_operational_details()
        
        # Slots - special handling with add/remove
        if "slots" in data:
            self._add_slots()
        
        # All other properties - show with labels, no JSON
        for key, value in data.items():
            if key in ["deviceKey", "name", "description", "OperationalDetails", "slots"]:
                continue  # Already handled
            
            # Determine label and display
            label = self._format_label(key)
            
            if isinstance(value, bool):
                self._add_bool_field(label, key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, (int, float)):
                self._add_field(label, key, str(value))
            elif isinstance(value, str):
                if len(value) > 100:
                    self._add_text_field(label, key, value)
                else:
                    self._add_field(label, key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, list):
                # Show list items as separate text boxes
                self._add_list_as_text_boxes(label, key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, dict):
                # Show dict properties as separate fields
                self._add_dict_as_fields(label, key, value)
            elif value is None:
                self._add_field(label, key, "")
            else:
                self._add_field(label, key, str(value))
        
        # Save button
        save_btn = StationeersButton(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text="💾 Save Changes",
            command=self._save_changes,
            height=40
        )
        save_btn.pack(fill="x", pady=16)
    
    def _format_label(self, key: str) -> str:
        """Format a key into a readable label"""
        # Add spaces before capital letters
        import re
        spaced = re.sub(r'([A-Z])', r' \1', key).strip()
        # Capitalize first letter
        return spaced[0].upper() + spaced[1:] if spaced else key
```

    def load_device(self, device: DeviceDescription):
        """Load device for editing - dynamically show ALL properties"""
        self.clear()
        self.current_device = device
        self.title_label.configure(text=device.name or device.device_key)
        
        # Get all properties from the device data
        data = device.data
        
        # Iterate through ALL properties and create appropriate editors
        for key, value in data.items():
            if isinstance(value, str):
                if len(value) > 100:
                    self._add_text_field(key, key, value)
                else:
                    self._add_field(key, key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, list):
                if key == "OperationalDetails":
                    self._add_operational_details()
                elif key == "slots":
                    self._add_slots()
                else:
                    self._add_list_field(key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, dict):
                self._add_dict_field(key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, bool):
                self._add_bool_field(key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, (int, float)):
                self._add_number_field(key, value)
            else:
                # Fallback for other types
                self._add_field(key, key, str(value))
        
        # Save button
        save_btn = StationeersButton(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text="💾 Save Changes",
            command=self._save_changes,
            height=40
        )
        save_btn.pack(fill="x", pady=16)

    def _add_bool_field(self, label: str, key: str, value: bool):
        """Add a boolean checkbox field"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=13
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        checkbox = ctk.CTkCheckBox(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=f"{'Enabled' if value else 'Disabled'}",
            fg_color=COLORS["orange"],
            hover_color=COLORS["orange_hover"],
            text_color=COLORS["text_primary"]
        )
        if value:
            checkbox.select()
        checkbox.pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[key] = checkbox
    
    def _add_list_as_text_boxes(self, label: str, key: str, value: list):
        """Add a list as individual labeled text boxes (no JSON)"""
        if not value:
            return
        
        # Section header
        header_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(self.scroll_frame, fg_color="transparent")
        header_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(16, 8))
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=14,
            color=COLORS["blue_light"]
        ).pack(side="left")
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header_frame,
            text=f"({len(value)} items)",
            size=11,
            color=COLORS["text_dim"]
        ).pack(side="left", padx=8)
        
        # Container for items
        container = ctk.CTkFrame(
            self.scroll_frame,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"],
            corner_radius=6
        )
        container.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        
        # Store entries for this list
        self.widgets[key] = []
        
        for i, item in enumerate(value):
            item_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(
                container,
                fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
                corner_radius=4
            )
            item_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=4)
            
            # Item label
            StationeersLabel(
                item_frame,
                text=f"Item {i+1}:",
                bold=True,
                size=11
            ).pack(anchor="w", padx=8, pady=(8, 2))
            
            # Item value
            if isinstance(item, (dict, list)):
                # For complex items, show as multi-line
                textbox = StationeersTextBox(item_frame, height=60)
                textbox.insert("1.0", str(item))
                textbox.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
                self.widgets[key].append(("textbox", textbox))
            else:
                # For simple items, show as entry
                entry = StationeersEntry(item_frame)
                entry.insert(0, str(item))
                entry.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
                self.widgets[key].append(("entry", entry))
    
    def _add_dict_as_fields(self, label: str, key: str, value: dict):
        """Add a dictionary as individual labeled fields (no JSON)"""
        if not value:
            return
        
        # Section header
        header_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(self.scroll_frame, fg_color="transparent")
        header_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(16, 8))
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=14,
            color=COLORS["blue_light"]
        ).pack(side="left")
        
        # Container for dict fields
        container = ctk.CTkFrame(
            self.scroll_frame,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"],
            corner_radius=6
        )
        container.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        
        # Store entries for this dict
        self.widgets[key] = {}
        
        for dict_key, dict_value in value.items():
            field_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(
                container,
                fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
                corner_radius=4
            )
            field_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=4)
            
            # Field label
            field_label = self._format_label(dict_key)
            StationeersLabel(
                field_frame,
                text=f"{field_label}:",
                bold=True,
                size=11
            ).pack(anchor="w", padx=8, pady=(8, 2))
            
            # Field value
            if isinstance(dict_value, bool):
                checkbox = ctk.CTkCheckBox(
                    field_frame,
                    text=f"{'Enabled' if dict_value else 'Disabled'}",
                    fg_color=COLORS["orange"],
                    hover_color=COLORS["orange_hover"],
                    text_color=COLORS["text_primary"]
                )
                if dict_value:
                    checkbox.select()
                checkbox.pack(anchor="w", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
                self.widgets[key][dict_key] = checkbox
            elif isinstance(dict_value, (list, dict)):
                textbox = StationeersTextBox(field_frame, height=60)
                textbox.insert("1.0", str(dict_value))
                textbox.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
                self.widgets[key][dict_key] = textbox
            else:
                entry = StationeersEntry(field_frame)
                entry.insert(0, str(dict_value))
                entry.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
                self.widgets[key][dict_key] = entry
```

    def _add_bool_field(self, label: str, value: bool):
        """Add a boolean checkbox field"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=13

        checkbox = ctk.CTkCheckBox(

            hover_color=COLORS["orange_hover"],

        if value:

        checkbox.pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[label] = checkbox
    
    def _add_number_field(self, label: str, value):
        """Add a number field"""
        self._add_field(label, label, str(value))
    
    def _add_list_field(self, label: str, value: list):
        """Add a list field (generic, not OperationalDetails/slots)"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=f"{label} (List)",
            bold=True,
            size=13,
            color=COLORS["blue_light"]
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        textbox = StationeersTextBox(self.scroll_frame, height=80)
        textbox.insert("1.0", json.dumps(value, indent=2))
        textbox.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[label] = textbox
    
    def _add_dict_field(self, label: str, value: dict):
        """Add a dictionary field"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=f"{label} (Object)",
            bold=True,
            size=13,
            color=COLORS["blue_light"]
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        textbox = StationeersTextBox(self.scroll_frame, height=120)
        textbox.insert("1.0", json.dumps(value, indent=2))
        textbox.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[label] = textbox

```
    def _save_changes(self):
        """Save all changes to current device - handle ALL property types"""
        if not self.current_device:
            return
        
        # Iterate through all widgets and update device data
        for key, widget in self.widgets.items():
            try:
                if key == "OperationalDetails":
                    # Handle operational details list
                    op_details = [
                        entry.get()
                        for entry in widget
                        if entry.get().strip()
                    ]
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, op_details)
                
                elif key == "slots":
                    # Handle slots list
                    slots = [
                        {
                            "slotName": name_entry.get(),
                            "description": desc_entry.get()
                        }
                        for name_entry, desc_entry in widget
                        if name_entry.get().strip()
                    ]
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, slots)
                
                elif isinstance(widget, list):
                    # Handle list of items
                    new_list = []
                    for widget_type, item_widget in widget:
                        if widget_type == "entry":
                            value = item_widget.get()
                            # Try to convert to original type
                            try:
                                # Try int
                                new_list.append(int(value))
                            except:
                                try:
                                    # Try float
                                    new_list.append(float(value))
                                except:
                                    # Keep as string
                                    new_list.append(value)
                        elif widget_type == "textbox":
                            value = item_widget.get("1.0", "end-1c")
                            # Try to eval for complex types (careful!)
                            try:
                                import ast
                                new_list.append(ast.literal_eval(value))
                            except:
                                new_list.append(value)
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, new_list)
                
                elif isinstance(widget, dict):
                    # Handle dictionary of fields
                    new_dict = {}
                    for dict_key, dict_widget in widget.items():
                        if isinstance(dict_widget, ctk.CTkCheckBox):
                            new_dict[dict_key] = dict_widget.get() == 1
                        elif isinstance(dict_widget, ctk.CTkTextbox):
                            value = dict_widget.get("1.0", "end-1c")
                            try:
                                import ast
                                new_dict[dict_key] = ast.literal_eval(value)
                            except:
                                new_dict[dict_key] = value
                        elif isinstance(dict_widget, ctk.CTkEntry):
                            value = dict_widget.get()
                            # Try to preserve type
                            try:
                                new_dict[dict_key] = int(value)
                            except:
                                try:
                                    new_dict[dict_key] = float(value)
                                except:
                                    new_dict[dict_key] = value
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, new_dict)
                
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkCheckBox):
                    # Handle checkbox
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, widget.get() == 1)
                
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkEntry):
                    # Handle entry - try to preserve type
                    value = widget.get()
                    original_value = self.current_device.data.get(key)
                    
                    if isinstance(original_value, bool):
                        self.current_device.update_field(key, value.lower() in ['true', '1', 'yes'])
                    elif isinstance(original_value, int):
                        try:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, int(value))
                        except:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                    elif isinstance(original_value, float):
                        try:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, float(value))
                        except:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                    else:
                        self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkTextbox):
                    # Handle textbox
                    value = widget.get("1.0", "end-1c")
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"Error saving {key}: {e}")
        
        # Notify parent
        self.on_save()
```

- oldString:

```
    def _save_changes(self):
        """Save all changes to current device - handle ALL property types"""
        if not self.current_device:
            return
        
        # Iterate through all widgets and update device data
        for key, widget in self.widgets.items():
            try:
                if key == "OperationalDetails":
                    # Handle operational details list
                    op_details = [
                        entry.get()
                        for entry in widget
                        if entry.get().strip()
                    ]
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, op_details)
                elif key == "slots":
                    # Handle slots list
                    slots = [
                        {
                            "slotName": name_entry.get(),
                            "description": desc_entry.get()
                        }
                        for name_entry, desc_entry in widget
                        if name_entry.get().strip()
                    ]
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, slots)
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkTextbox):
                    # Handle textbox (could be string, list, or dict)
                    value = widget.get("1.0", "end-1c")
                    # Try to parse as JSON for lists/dicts
                    try:
                        parsed_value = json.loads(value)
                        self.current_device.update_field(key, parsed_value)
                    except:
                        # Not JSON, just a string
                        self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkCheckBox):
                    # Handle checkbox
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, widget.get() == 1)
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkEntry):
                    # Handle entry - try to preserve type
                    value = widget.get()
                    original_value = self.current_device.data.get(key)
                    if isinstance(original_value, (int, float)):
                        try:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, float(value) if '.' in value else int(value))
                        except:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                    else:
                        self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"Error saving {key}: {e}")
        
        # Notify parent
        self.on_save()
