"""Main application window"""
import customtkinter as ctk
import os
import json
import re
from typing import Optional, Any, Callable
from config import COLORS, WINDOW_TITLE, WINDOW_SIZE, DESCRIPTIONS_JSON_PATH, FONT_FAMILY
from components import *
from models import DeviceDescription, DescriptionsFile
from json_service import JsonService
from preview_panel import PreviewPanel


class DeviceEditorPanel(ctk.CTkFrame):
    """Right panel for editing device details - FORM-BASED with labeled text boxes"""
    
    def __init__(self, master, on_save: Callable):
        super().__init__(
            master,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=0
        )
        
        self.on_save = on_save
        self.current_device: Optional[DeviceDescription] = None
        self.widgets = {}  # Store all input widgets
        
        # Header
        self.header = ctk.CTkFrame(self, fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"], height=60)
        self.header.pack(fill="x", padx=0, pady=0)
        self.header.pack_propagate(False)
        
        self.title_label = StationeersLabel(
            self.header,
            text="Select a device",
            size=18,
            bold=True,
            color=COLORS["orange"]
        )
        self.title_label.pack(side="left", padx=20, pady=15)
        
        # Scrollable content
        self.scroll = ctk.CTkScrollableFrame(
            self,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=0
        )
        self.scroll.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=0, pady=0)
        self.scroll_frame = self.scroll
    
    def clear(self):
        """Clear all widgets from the panel"""
        for widget in self.scroll_frame.winfo_children():
            widget.destroy()
        self.widgets.clear()
    
    def load_device(self, device: DeviceDescription):
        """Load device for editing - show ALL properties as labeled text boxes"""
        self.clear()
        self.current_device = device
        self.title_label.configure(text=device.name or device.device_key)
        
        # Get all properties from the device data
        data = device.data
        
        # Standard fields with clear labels
        if "deviceKey" in data:
            self._add_field("Device Key", "deviceKey", str(data["deviceKey"]))
        
        if "name" in data:
            self._add_field("Name", "name", str(data["name"]))
        
        if "description" in data:
            self._add_text_field("Description", "description", str(data["description"]))
        
        # Operational Details - special handling with add/remove
        if "OperationalDetails" in data:
            self._add_operational_details()
        
        # Slots - special handling with add/remove
        if "slots" in data:
            self._add_slots()
        
        # All other properties - show with labels, no JSON
        for key, value in data.items():
            if key in ["deviceKey", "name", "description", "OperationalDetails", "slots"]:
                continue  # Already handled
            
            # Determine label and display
            label = self._format_label(key)
            
            if isinstance(value, bool):
                self._add_bool_field(label, key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, (int, float)):
                self._add_field(label, key, str(value))
            elif isinstance(value, str):
                if len(value) > 100:
                    self._add_text_field(label, key, value)
                else:
                    self._add_field(label, key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, list):
                # Show list items as separate text boxes
                self._add_list_as_text_boxes(label, key, value)
            elif isinstance(value, dict):
                # Show dict properties as separate fields
                self._add_dict_as_fields(label, key, value)
            elif value is None:
                self._add_field(label, key, "")
            else:
                self._add_field(label, key, str(value))
        
        # Save button
        save_btn = StationeersButton(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text="💾 Save Changes",
            command=self._save_changes,
            height=40
        )
        save_btn.pack(fill="x", pady=16)
    
    def _format_label(self, key: str) -> str:
        """Format a key into a readable label"""
        # Add spaces before capital letters
        spaced = re.sub(r'([A-Z])', r' \1', key).strip()
        # Capitalize first letter
        return spaced[0].upper() + spaced[1:] if spaced else key
    
    def _add_field(self, label: str, key: str, value: str):
        """Add a simple text field with label"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=13
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        entry = StationeersEntry(self.scroll_frame)
        entry.insert(0, value)
        entry.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[key] = entry
    
    def _add_text_field(self, label: str, key: str, value: str):
        """Add a multi-line text field with label"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=13
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        textbox = StationeersTextBox(self.scroll_frame, height=100)
        textbox.insert("1.0", value)
        textbox.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[key] = textbox
    
    def _add_bool_field(self, label: str, key: str, value: bool):
        """Add a boolean checkbox field"""
        StationeersLabel(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=13
        ).pack(anchor="w", pady=(12, 4))
        
        checkbox = ctk.CTkCheckBox(
            self.scroll_frame,
            text=f"{'Enabled' if value else 'Disabled'}",
            fg_color=COLORS["orange"],
            hover_color=COLORS["orange_hover"],
            text_color=COLORS["text_primary"]
        )
        if value:
            checkbox.select()
        checkbox.pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 8))
        self.widgets[key] = checkbox
    
    def _add_list_as_text_boxes(self, label: str, key: str, value: list):
        """Add a list as individual labeled text boxes (no JSON)"""
        if not value:
            return
        
        # Section header
        header_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(self.scroll_frame, fg_color="transparent")
        header_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(16, 8))
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=14,
            color=COLORS["blue_light"]
        ).pack(side="left")
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header_frame,
            text=f"({len(value)} items)",
            size=11,
            color=COLORS["text_dim"]
        ).pack(side="left", padx=8)
        
        # Container for items
        container = ctk.CTkFrame(
            self.scroll_frame,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"],
            corner_radius=6
        )
        container.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        
        # Store entries for this list
        self.widgets[key] = []
        
        for i, item in enumerate(value):
            item_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(
                container,
                fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
                corner_radius=4
            )
            item_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=4)
            
            # Item label
            StationeersLabel(
                item_frame,
                text=f"Item {i+1}:",
                bold=True,
                size=11
            ).pack(anchor="w", padx=8, pady=(8, 2))
            
            # Item value
            if isinstance(item, (dict, list)):
                # For complex items, show as multi-line
                textbox = StationeersTextBox(item_frame, height=60)
                textbox.insert("1.0", str(item))
                textbox.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
                self.widgets[key].append(("textbox", textbox))
            else:
                # For simple items, show as entry
                entry = StationeersEntry(item_frame)
                entry.insert(0, str(item))
                entry.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
                self.widgets[key].append(("entry", entry))
    
    def _add_dict_as_fields(self, label: str, key: str, value: dict):
        """Add a dictionary as individual labeled fields (no JSON)"""
        if not value:
            return
        
        # Section header
        header_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(self.scroll_frame, fg_color="transparent")
        header_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(16, 8))
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header_frame,
            text=label,
            bold=True,
            size=14,
            color=COLORS["blue_light"]
        ).pack(side="left")
        
        # Container for dict fields
        container = ctk.CTkFrame(
            self.scroll_frame,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"],
            corner_radius=6
        )
        container.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        
        # Store entries for this dict
        self.widgets[key] = {}
        
        for dict_key, dict_value in value.items():
            field_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(
                container,
                fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
                corner_radius=4
            )
            field_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=4)
            
            # Field label
            field_label = self._format_label(dict_key)
            StationeersLabel(
                field_frame,
                text=f"{field_label}:",
                bold=True,
                size=11
            ).pack(anchor="w", padx=8, pady=(8, 2))
            
            # Field value
            if isinstance(dict_value, bool):
                checkbox = ctk.CTkCheckBox(
                    field_frame,
                    text=f"{'Enabled' if dict_value else 'Disabled'}",
                    fg_color=COLORS["orange"],
                    hover_color=COLORS["orange_hover"],
                    text_color=COLORS["text_primary"]
                )
                if dict_value:
                    checkbox.select()
                checkbox.pack(anchor="w", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
                self.widgets[key][dict_key] = checkbox
            elif isinstance(dict_value, (list, dict)):
                textbox = StationeersTextBox(field_frame, height=60)
                textbox.insert("1.0", str(dict_value))
                textbox.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
                self.widgets[key][dict_key] = textbox
            else:
                entry = StationeersEntry(field_frame)
                entry.insert(0, str(dict_value))
                entry.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 8))
                self.widgets[key][dict_key] = entry
    
    def _add_operational_details(self):
        """Add Operational Details section with add/remove capability"""
        header_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(self.scroll_frame, fg_color="transparent")
        header_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(16, 8))
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header_frame,
            text="Operational Details",
            bold=True,
            size=14,
            color=COLORS["blue_light"]
        ).pack(side="left")
        
        add_btn = StationeersButton(
            header_frame,
            text="+ Add",
            command=lambda: self._add_operational_detail_entry(""),
            width=80,
            height=28
        )
        add_btn.pack(side="right", padx=4)
        
        # Container
        self.op_details_container = ctk.CTkFrame(
            self.scroll_frame,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"],
            corner_radius=6
        )
        self.op_details_container.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        
        # Store entries
        self.widgets["OperationalDetails"] = []
        
        # Add existing details
        details = self.current_device.data.get("OperationalDetails", [])
        for detail in details:
            self._add_operational_detail_entry(detail)
    
    def _add_operational_detail_entry(self, text: str):
        """Add a single operational detail entry"""
        entry_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(
            self.op_details_container,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=4
        )
        entry_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=4)
        
        entry = StationeersEntry(entry_frame)
        entry.insert(0, text)
        entry.pack(side="left", fill="x", expand=True, padx=8, pady=8)
        
        remove_btn = StationeersButton(
            entry_frame,
            text="✕",
            command=lambda: self._remove_operational_detail(entry_frame, entry),
            width=40,
            height=30
        )
        remove_btn.pack(side="right", padx=8, pady=8)
        
        self.widgets["OperationalDetails"].append(entry)
    
    def _remove_operational_detail(self, frame, entry):
        """Remove an operational detail entry"""
        if entry in self.widgets["OperationalDetails"]:
            self.widgets["OperationalDetails"].remove(entry)
        frame.destroy()
    
    def _add_slots(self):
        """Add Slots section with add/remove capability"""
        header_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(self.scroll_frame, fg_color="transparent")
        header_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(16, 8))
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header_frame,
            text="Slots",
            bold=True,
            size=14,
            color=COLORS["blue_light"]
        ).pack(side="left")
        
        add_btn = StationeersButton(
            header_frame,
            text="+ Add Slot",
            command=lambda: self._add_slot_entry("", ""),
            width=100,
            height=28
        )
        add_btn.pack(side="right", padx=4)
        
        # Container
        self.slots_container = ctk.CTkFrame(
            self.scroll_frame,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"],
            corner_radius=6
        )
        self.slots_container.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))
        
        # Store entries
        self.widgets["slots"] = []
        
        # Add existing slots
        slots = self.current_device.data.get("slots", [])
        for slot in slots:
            self._add_slot_entry(
                slot.get("slotName", ""),
                slot.get("description", "")
            )
    
    def _add_slot_entry(self, name: str, desc: str):
        """Add a single slot entry"""
        slot_frame = ctk.CTkFrame(
            self.slots_container,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=4
        )
        slot_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=4)
        
        # Slot Name
        StationeersLabel(
            slot_frame,
            text="Slot Name:",
            bold=True,
            size=11
        ).pack(anchor="w", padx=8, pady=(8, 2))
        
        name_entry = StationeersEntry(slot_frame)
        name_entry.insert(0, name)
        name_entry.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 4))
        
        # Description
        StationeersLabel(
            slot_frame,
            text="Description:",
            bold=True,
            size=11
        ).pack(anchor="w", padx=8, pady=(4, 2))
        
        desc_entry = StationeersEntry(slot_frame)
        desc_entry.insert(0, desc)
        desc_entry.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=(0, 4))
        
        # Remove button
        remove_btn = StationeersButton(
            slot_frame,
            text="✕ Remove Slot",
            command=lambda: self._remove_slot(slot_frame, name_entry, desc_entry),
            width=120,
            height=30
        )
        remove_btn.pack(anchor="e", padx=8, pady=8)
        
        self.widgets["slots"].append((name_entry, desc_entry))
    
    def _remove_slot(self, frame, name_entry, desc_entry):
        """Remove a slot entry"""
        entry_tuple = (name_entry, desc_entry)
        if entry_tuple in self.widgets["slots"]:
            self.widgets["slots"].remove(entry_tuple)
        frame.destroy()
    
    def _save_changes(self):
        """Save all changes to current device - handle ALL property types"""
        if not self.current_device:
            return
        
        # Iterate through all widgets and update device data
        for key, widget in self.widgets.items():
            try:
                if key == "OperationalDetails":
                    # Handle operational details list
                    op_details = [
                        entry.get()
                        for entry in widget
                        if entry.get().strip()
                    ]
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, op_details)
                
                elif key == "slots":
                    # Handle slots list
                    slots = [
                        {
                            "slotName": name_entry.get(),
                            "description": desc_entry.get()
                        }
                        for name_entry, desc_entry in widget
                        if name_entry.get().strip()
                    ]
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, slots)
                
                elif isinstance(widget, list):
                    # Handle list of items
                    new_list = []
                    for widget_type, item_widget in widget:
                        if widget_type == "entry":
                            value = item_widget.get()
                            # Try to convert to original type
                            try:
                                # Try int
                                new_list.append(int(value))
                            except:
                                try:
                                    # Try float
                                    new_list.append(float(value))
                                except:
                                    # Keep as string
                                    new_list.append(value)
                        elif widget_type == "textbox":
                            value = item_widget.get("1.0", "end-1c")
                            # Try to eval for complex types (careful!)
                            try:
                                import ast
                                new_list.append(ast.literal_eval(value))
                            except:
                                new_list.append(value)
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, new_list)
                
                elif isinstance(widget, dict):
                    # Handle dictionary of fields
                    new_dict = {}
                    for dict_key, dict_widget in widget.items():
                        if isinstance(dict_widget, ctk.CTkCheckBox):
                            new_dict[dict_key] = dict_widget.get() == 1
                        elif isinstance(dict_widget, ctk.CTkTextbox):
                            value = dict_widget.get("1.0", "end-1c")
                            try:
                                import ast
                                new_dict[dict_key] = ast.literal_eval(value)
                            except:
                                new_dict[dict_key] = value
                        elif isinstance(dict_widget, ctk.CTkEntry):
                            value = dict_widget.get()
                            # Try to preserve type
                            try:
                                new_dict[dict_key] = int(value)
                            except:
                                try:
                                    new_dict[dict_key] = float(value)
                                except:
                                    new_dict[dict_key] = value
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, new_dict)
                
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkCheckBox):
                    # Handle checkbox
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, widget.get() == 1)
                
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkEntry):
                    # Handle entry - try to preserve type
                    value = widget.get()
                    original_value = self.current_device.data.get(key)
                    
                    if isinstance(original_value, bool):
                        self.current_device.update_field(key, value.lower() in ['true', '1', 'yes'])
                    elif isinstance(original_value, int):
                        try:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, int(value))
                        except:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                    elif isinstance(original_value, float):
                        try:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, float(value))
                        except:
                            self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                    else:
                        self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                
                elif isinstance(widget, ctk.CTkTextbox):
                    # Handle textbox
                    value = widget.get("1.0", "end-1c")
                    self.current_device.update_field(key, value)
                
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"Error saving {key}: {e}")
        
        # Notify parent
        self.on_save()


class StationpediaEditor(ctk.CTk):
    """Main application window"""
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Configure window
        self.title(WINDOW_TITLE)
        self.geometry(f"{WINDOW_SIZE[0]}x{WINDOW_SIZE[1]}")
        ctk.set_appearance_mode("dark")
        ctk.set_default_color_theme("blue")
        
        # Configure colors
        self.configure(fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"])
        
        # Initialize services
        self.json_service = JsonService()
        self.descriptions_file: Optional[DescriptionsFile] = None
        self.current_category: Optional[str] = None
        self.current_device_index = 0
        self.devices_per_page = 100
        self.devices_increment = 50
        self.search_after_id = None
        self.preview_mode = True  # Start in preview mode
        
        # Create UI
        self._create_ui()
        
        # Load data
        self._load_descriptions()
    
    def _create_ui(self):
        """Create the main UI layout"""
        # Top bar
        top_bar = ctk.CTkFrame(self, fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"], height=60)
        top_bar.pack(fill="x", padx=0, pady=0)
        top_bar.pack_propagate(False)
        
        StationeersLabel(
            top_bar,
            text="🔧 Stationpedia Editor",
            size=20,
            bold=True,
            color=COLORS["orange"]
        ).pack(side="left", padx=20)
        
        # Mode toggle button
        self.mode_btn = StationeersButton(
            top_bar,
            text="✏️ Edit Mode",
            command=self._toggle_mode,
            width=150,
            height=40
        )
        self.mode_btn.pack(side="right", padx=20)
        
        self.status_label = StationeersLabel(
            top_bar,
            text="Loading...",
            size=12,
            color=COLORS["text_dim"]
        )
        self.status_label.pack(side="right", padx=20)
        
        # Main content area with grid layout
        content = ctk.CTkFrame(self, fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"])
        content.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=0, pady=0)
        
        # Configure grid columns: Categories (250px) | Devices (450px, scalable) | Preview/Editor (600px, scalable)
        content.columnconfigure(0, weight=0, minsize=250)
        content.columnconfigure(1, weight=1, minsize=450)
        content.columnconfigure(2, weight=2, minsize=600)
        content.rowconfigure(0, weight=1)
        
        # Left panel: Categories
        self._create_category_panel(content)
        
        # Middle panel: Devices
        self._create_device_panel(content)
        
        # Right panel: Preview mode (default)
        self.preview_panel = PreviewPanel(content)
        self.preview_panel.grid(row=0, column=2, sticky="nsew", padx=0, pady=0)
        
        # Right panel: Edit mode (hidden by default)
        self.editor_panel = DeviceEditorPanel(content, on_save=self._on_save)
        self.editor_panel.grid(row=0, column=2, sticky="nsew", padx=0, pady=0)
        self.editor_panel.grid_remove()  # Hide initially
    
    def _create_category_panel(self, parent):
        """Create the left panel for categories"""
        panel = ctk.CTkFrame(
            parent,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=0,
            border_width=2,
            border_color=COLORS["orange"]
        )
        panel.grid(row=0, column=0, sticky="nsew", padx=0, pady=0)
        
        # Header
        header = ctk.CTkFrame(panel, fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"], height=60)
        header.pack(fill="x", padx=0, pady=0)
        header.pack_propagate(False)
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header,
            text="📁 Categories",
            size=16,
            bold=True
        ).pack(side="left", padx=16, pady=15)
        
        # Category list
        self.category_scroll = ctk.CTkScrollableFrame(
            panel,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=0
        )
        self.category_scroll.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=0, pady=0)
    
    def _create_device_panel(self, parent):
        """Create the middle panel for devices"""
        panel = ctk.CTkFrame(
            parent,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=0,
            border_width=2,
            border_color=COLORS["orange"]
        )
        panel.grid(row=0, column=1, sticky="nsew", padx=0, pady=0)
        
        # Header with search
        header = ctk.CTkFrame(panel, fg_color=COLORS["bg_dark"], height=60)
        header.pack(fill="x", padx=0, pady=0)
        header.pack_propagate(False)
        
        StationeersLabel(
            header,
            text="🔍 Devices",
            size=16,
            bold=True
        ).pack(side="left", padx=16, pady=15)
        
        self.search_entry = StationeersEntry(
            header,
            placeholder_text="Search devices..."
        )
        self.search_entry.pack(side="right", padx=16, pady=12, fill="x", expand=True)
        self.search_entry.bind("<KeyRelease>", self._debounced_filter)
        
        # Device list
        self.device_scroll = ctk.CTkScrollableFrame(
            panel,
            fg_color=COLORS["bg_medium"],
            corner_radius=0
        )
        self.device_scroll.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=0, pady=0)
        
        # Load more button (initially hidden)
        self.load_more_btn = StationeersButton(
            panel,
            text="⬇️ Load More Devices",
            command=self._load_more_devices,
            height=40
        )
    
    def _toggle_mode(self):
        """Toggle between preview and edit modes"""
        self.preview_mode = not self.preview_mode
        
        if self.preview_mode:
            # Switch to preview mode
            self.editor_panel.grid_remove()
            self.preview_panel.grid()
            self.mode_btn.configure(text="✏️ Edit Mode")
            
            # Reload current device in preview
            if hasattr(self, 'current_device') and self.current_device:
                self.preview_panel.load_device(self.current_device)
        else:
            # Switch to edit mode
            self.preview_panel.grid_remove()
            self.editor_panel.grid()
            self.mode_btn.configure(text="👁️ Preview Mode")
            
            # Reload current device in editor
            if hasattr(self, 'current_device') and self.current_device:
                self.editor_panel.load_device(self.current_device)
    
    def _debounced_filter(self, event=None):
        """Debounce the search filter to avoid lag"""
        # Cancel previous scheduled call
        if self.search_after_id:
            self.after_cancel(self.search_after_id)
        
        # Schedule new call after 300ms
        self.search_after_id = self.after(300, self._filter_devices)
    
    def _load_descriptions(self):
        """Load the descriptions file"""
        try:
            self.descriptions_file = self.json_service.load_file(DESCRIPTIONS_JSON_PATH)
            self._populate_categories()
            self.status_label.configure(
                text=f"Loaded {len(self.descriptions_file.devices)} devices",
                text_color=COLORS["text_primary"]
            )
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_label.configure(
                text=f"Error: {str(e)}",
                text_color=COLORS["error"]
            )
    
    def _populate_categories(self):
        """Populate the category list"""
        for widget in self.category_scroll.winfo_children():
            widget.destroy()
        
        if not self.descriptions_file:
            return
        
        categories = self.descriptions_file.get_categories()
        
        for category, devices in categories.items():
            item = CategoryTreeItem(
                self.category_scroll,
                text=f"{category} ({len(devices)})",
                command=lambda c=category: self._on_category_selected(c)
            )
            item.pack(fill="x", pady=2, padx=8)
    
    def _on_category_selected(self, category: str):
        """Handle category selection"""
        self.current_category = category
        self.current_device_index = 0
        self._filter_devices()
    
    def _filter_devices(self):
        """Filter and display devices based on category and search"""
        for widget in self.device_scroll.winfo_children():
            widget.destroy()
        
        if not self.descriptions_file:
            return
        
        # Get devices for current category
        if self.current_category:
            categories = self.descriptions_file.get_categories()
            devices = categories.get(self.current_category, [])
        else:
            devices = self.descriptions_file.devices
        
        # Apply search filter
        search_term = self.search_entry.get().lower()
        if search_term:
            devices = [
                d for d in devices
                if search_term in d.name.lower() or search_term in d.device_key.lower()
            ]
        
        # Lazy loading: show first batch
        display_count = min(self.devices_per_page, len(devices))
        
        for i in range(display_count):
            device = devices[i]
            item = DeviceListItem(
                self.device_scroll,
                text=device.name,
                command=lambda d=device: self._on_device_selected(d)
            )
            item.pack(fill="x", pady=2, padx=8)
        
        # Show load more button if there are more devices
        if len(devices) > display_count:
            self.load_more_btn.pack(fill="x", padx=8, pady=8)
            self.load_more_btn.configure(
                text=f"⬇️ Load More ({len(devices) - display_count} remaining)"
            )
        else:
            self.load_more_btn.pack_forget()
        
        # Store for load more
        self.filtered_devices = devices
        self.current_device_index = display_count
    
    def _load_more_devices(self):
        """Load more devices in the list"""
        if not hasattr(self, 'filtered_devices'):
            return
        
        # Calculate how many more to show
        remaining = len(self.filtered_devices) - self.current_device_index
        load_count = min(self.devices_increment, remaining)
        
        # Add more devices
        for i in range(self.current_device_index, self.current_device_index + load_count):
            device = self.filtered_devices[i]
            item = DeviceListItem(
                self.device_scroll,
                text=device.name,
                command=lambda d=device: self._on_device_selected(d)
            )
            # Insert before the load more button
            item.pack(fill="x", pady=2, padx=8)
        
        self.current_device_index += load_count
        
        # Update or hide load more button
        if self.current_device_index >= len(self.filtered_devices):
            self.load_more_btn.pack_forget()
        else:
            self.load_more_btn.configure(
                text=f"⬇️ Load More ({len(self.filtered_devices) - self.current_device_index} remaining)"
            )
    
    def _on_device_selected(self, device: DeviceDescription):
        """Handle device selection"""
        self.current_device = device
        
        # Route to appropriate panel based on mode
        if self.preview_mode:
            self.preview_panel.load_device(device)
        else:
            self.editor_panel.load_device(device)
    
    def _on_save(self):
        """Handle save button click"""
        try:
            self.json_service.save_file(DESCRIPTIONS_JSON_PATH, self.descriptions_file)
            self.status_label.configure(
                text="✓ Saved successfully",
                text_color=COLORS["success"]
            )
            # Clear success message after 3 seconds
            self.after(3000, lambda: self.status_label.configure(
                text=f"Loaded {len(self.descriptions_file.devices)} devices",
                text_color=COLORS["text_primary"]
            ))
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_label.configure(
                text=f"Error saving: {str(e)}",
                text_color=COLORS["error"]
            )


if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = StationpediaEditor()
    app.mainloop()

```
